blocks.heading: Prologue Part A: November 29
blocks.content: Start a new game and select the game's difficulty level. If you plan on getting the Platinum trophy, you will need at least two playthroughs. If you have a save data from Trails of Cold Steel, you can transfer your save file over. This will let you start a new game with some extra bonuses.

rows: Balanced for quick, easy battles. Ideal for beginners and story enthusiast.
Enemies are at 0.70 of their stats.
Build around satisfyingly tough combat. Aimed to people used to playing RPG.
Enemies are at 1.00 of their stats.
Battles will take everything you have. For skilled players who find Normal too easy.
Enemies are at 1.15 of their stats.
Balanced for New Game+. Ideal for replays.
Enemies are at 1.30 of their stats.
Sepith x 100 (All Colors), Attack 1, Zeram Powder
Sepith x 300 (All Colors), Attack 1, Soul Blur, Zeram Powder
Sepith x 500 (All Colors), Attack 1, Soul Blur, Saintly Force, Zeram Powder

blocks.content: Watch the introduction sequence, if you haven't beaten the original Trails of Cold Steel, this part will give you a summary of the ending of the original game, so beware of the spoilers you are about to see. After the intro sequences is over, you will get to control [Rean](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough#Rean "walkthrough").

[![Trails of cold steel ii controls vita.jpg](./images/e2bf691b-320px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_controls_vita.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_controls_vita.jpg) [![Trails of cold steel ii controls ps3.jpg](./images/7dcf5764-320px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_controls_ps3.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_controls_ps3.jpg)

Enemy information in this guide is based on Normal mode circumstances. As you claim control, the game will let you know about **saving**. This is done by going to the menu and using the **Save** option. You can also access the **Cross-Save feature**, which lets you upload your save data to PSN. This is for players to transfer save files between the PS3 or Vita.
If you ever get lost, pressing the **Square** button will open the Navigation menu, it will also highlight your next objective on the bottom right of the screen.

Head downhill, you will notice a shining object. Examine it to receive Rean's equipment. The game will let you know about the [Orbment](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough#Orbment "walkthrough") system. Go to the menu and equip your Master quartz under the Orbment section. Now run down the hill, you will see a monster, by touching it, you will engage in battle. If you manage to sneak up on a monster, or stun it with your field attack, (Pressing the Confirm button, **X or O in Japanese version**) you will get an additional [advantage](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough#Advantage "walkthrough") during battle. The bonus includes extra turns and reduced enemy HP. After you have defeated the monster in combat, the game will let you know about Monster Notes. Each time you defeated a monster, additional data is filled in regarding to enemies you have previously fought. If you want to fill in this information immediately you need to use the **Battle Scope** item, a quartz with the spell **"Analyze"** or **Emma and Eliot's Detector ability**. Now just keep going east to see another event. Then further down you will fight a rock type creature. The game will prompt you into the basics of Arts. This monster has a high physical defense, so use the Fire Bolt spell to quickly defeat the monster. Now further down the hill, Rean will notice an Orbment Charging Station, examine it to fully restore your character's HP and EP. Now enter the next area to Eisengard Mountains 2.
**Eisengard Range**

Head down the hill to find a treasure chest that contains a **Tear** quartz. Go a little further, Rean will notice it's a strong type of monster. Fight it, the game will let you know about using the S-Craft function. S-Crafts are super attacks that require a 100-200 CP to perform, found under the Craft section. It can also be used by pressing [![PSTRIANGLE.png](./images/b87b3922-20px-PSTRIANGLE.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:PSTRIANGLE.png) **Triangle** when it's not your turn, although using it this way adds a lot more delay to your turn.

When you have defeated the monster, head to the south corner of the map to find a **Teara Balm**. Then go to the east area for an event scene. Then head to the northeast corner of the map to find a **Proxy Puppet** in the treasure box. Then take the southeast exit to Eisengard Mountain 3. Pick up the **Celestial Balm** at the treasure box just directly south and then go all the way to the south end to find an Orbment Charging Station. Heal yourself and go to the southeast end to fight a boss battle.
**Note:** Maps in this guide are designed with the compass facing north.

[![Trails of cold steel ii eisengard range.png](./images/1ace32e6-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_eisengard_range.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_eisengard_range.png)

blocks.name: Magic Knight Ortheim
blocks.strategy: The first boss battle will be pretty basic. All the boss does is it attacks with its sword. Use Flame Strike to hurt the boss, this ability has a chance to inflict Burn, this will help you expedite his demise. Heal when Rean is under 3000 HP with either Tear or Teara Balm. If the boss gets 2 turns in a row, use a Teara Balm immediately. As soon as you've brought it under 15000 HP the battle will end.

blocks.heading: **Ymir**
blocks.content: [![Trails of cold steel ii ymir.jpg](./images/cfec7901-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ymir.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ymir.jpg)

Watch the event scene, you will be introduced to Elise, Alfin and Toval again. Afterwards, leave the building, the game will let you know about events. story events are marked with a **red exclamation mark** and a **green exclamation mark** for side events. Then go to the general store "Plover" located at the southwest corner of Ymir. Purchase the **Imperial Chronicle Issue #1** and **Gambler Jack Reprint Chapter 1** (There is a trophy for collecting all books found in the game).
Now visit all the red exclamation mark areas marked on the map.

items.label: **Rean's Parents (Lucia and Baron Schwarzer) at the Baron's Mansion**
**Toval at the Inn & Pub "Valley Echo"** (You can also speak to pub owner, Gerald for some pancakes.)
**Werner at the kitchen area, of the Hotel "The Phoenix Wings" (Northeast on map)**

blocks.content: When your done doing all the activities listed above. Go to the **Phoenix Wing** hotel and speak to the receptionist, **Baggins** and then go to **Hot Springs** on right side of the building. Entering the Hot Spring will automatically advance the story, so finished everything you need to do before going in. Afterwards, Elise and Toval will join your party. Go back inside the **Baron Mansion** and speak to **Alfin** for a short event scene. You can also use the footbath at the center of town to fully restore your party, including CP as well. When you are all ready to go, head to the northwest exit to go to Ymir Canyon.

rows: Before advancing in this area, it's recommended to stock up on Teara and Reviving Balms. To fund this, you can cook Salty Onigiri with Elise to create Tri-Colored Onigiri (Superb result) and then sell them for 150 Mira each. You should aim to have at least 15 to 20 of each. Additionally, ensure that all three characters are equipped with the best accessory available from the store, which boosts Strength, ATS, and Speed. Finally, invest in EP Charges with any remaining funds.

blocks.heading: **Ymir Canyon**
blocks.content: Watch the event scene, when you the first monster, the game will let you know about [Link attacks](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough#Combat_Links "walkthrough"). Hitting enemies with the right attack type can cause an enemy to unbalance which will lead to Link attack for bonus damage. Now finish off the first monster and continue on. Go to the northeast end to find a treasure chest that contains the Lighter accessory. Continue on through the path northwest, if you reach to the northwest end, you will find a monster chest that contains a **Zeram Powder**. You can use Toval's S-Craft on kill all eight enemies at once to get the **Pieces of Eight** trophy. Then go back south and cross the bridge to the east, pick up the **U-Material** in the chest located at the east end. Then head to the north exit to **Ymir Canyon 2**.

Pick up the **Tearal Balm** on your way north, then take the northwest path, eventually the path will split, by going south you can find a **Poison** Quartz in the treasure box. Then go north, all the way to end. You will find another chest with some **Sepith** and just a little further will be an Orbment Charging Station. Heal up and enter the next area for a boss fight.

[![Trails of cold steel ii ymir canyon.png](./images/f5a7408d-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ymir_canyon.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ymir_canyon.png)

blocks.name: Magic Knight Ortheim
blocks.strategy: Ortheim seems to have an massive upgrade compared to the previous encounter. Ortheim has an area attack move which can hit pretty hard. The most annoying thing about this fight is when Ortheim buff itself, this will raise its attack power and restore 20% of it's HP and will prolong the fight. Use Elise as your main healer, she can use her Holy Squall which restore 60% of your HP within a small radius or the Tear spell. Have Rean and Toval as your main attackers, since you don't have any useful arts at the moment, rely on physical attacks and use your S-Craft on turns with a critical bonus.

blocks.name: Magic Knight Ortheim (Phase 2)
blocks.strategy: You will be using the Ashen Knight, Valimar for this battle. Mech combat is like playing a game of rock-paper-scissors. You need to select a body part and hit. Attacking the correct part will land a critical hit which allows you to perform a Link Attack. Link Attacks provide damage bonus, making them the optimal method to win. Use the picture below as a reference on which part to attack. There isn't much strategy to this battle, just attack it's head during it's idle stance, and it's arms during it's attack stance.

blocks.heading: December 1st
blocks.content: As soon as you gain control of Rean, you'll notice the addition of the ability to **Quick Travel** under the navigation menu. Your first task is to head to the general store and speak to Raio, the shopkeeper on the right. The game will introduce you to weapon synthesis and the process of unlocking Orbment Slots. The Orbment system involves upgrading slots to equip more potent types of Quartz.

Next, speak to Camillia. Watching the event scene with her will unlock the item trading function, similar to the pawn shop feature from the previous game. (**Note**: If this is your second playthrough, she will allow you to trade Zemurian Ore Shards for 50 U-Materials.)

Before leaving town through Ymir Canyon, don't forget to speak to **Luke** near the wreckage of the station. He'll provide you with some Tear Balms to aid you on your journey. Once you're ready, it's time to venture out.
**Lunaria Nature Park**

After the event scene, you will be warped into **Lunaria Nature Park**. Head south to Lunaria Nature Park 3. The game will let you know that this area contains high elements, which means Time, Space, and Mirage elements have effects on monsters here, there is also an additional type of bonus effects on turn order which can be an advantage or disadvantage for your party. Head down to the southeast corner to pick up a **Stone Brooch** in a treasure chest, then continue all the way to the southwest path. On the very southwest corner of the map contains some **Sepith Mass** in the treasure box. Then head to the exit located southeast of **Lunaria Nature Park 2**.

The path will then split into two ways, head to the west end to get a **Teara Balm** from the treasure box, and there is also a fishing spot near this area. Afterwards, go to the east end to get **Citrus Bottle** from the treasure chest. Then take the bridge south and go all the way to the west corner to find a [Scepter](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Scepter "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") **Master Quartz** in a monster chest. Then head to the opposite end, by the east area for an **EP Charge II**. After that go to the south exit of the map to go to Lunaria Nature Park 1.

Head south, and go to the east side of the map to the northeast corner to find an **HP 1** in a treasure chest, then head south and go all the way to the southwest corner to get some **Sepith**. Then they the center path south, when you're near the end of the park, you will see an Orbment Charging Station. Leave the park to face a boss battle.

[![Trails of cold steel ii lunaria nature park.png](./images/b34efd82-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_lunaria_nature_park.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_lunaria_nature_park.png)

blocks.name: Grunoja
blocks.strategy: As soon as this battle starts, the game will let you know about the Overdrive function. This function is highlighted through the small circle gauge at the upper right part of the screen. Using Overdrive will restore that character's HP, EP, CP, granting them three extra turns, and an instant magic cast between the two characters that are linked. This is a very powerful function that can be used to exploit bosses. Anyways activate Overdrive by highlighting the attack icon and Holding the Right button when it changes icon, and press the confirm button to do Overdrive. Buff up your characters and attack the boss. The boss has a few abilities, from buffing itself to paralyzing your characters with Seal or hitting a single target really hard. I recommend using Toval's wind magic against this boss, as he can cast them really quickly. Have Rean uses Autumn Leaf Cutter or Arc Slash to delay the boss. If your CP is maxed, save your S-Craft when the Boss's HP is low.

blocks.content: **West Celdic Highway & East Trista Highway**

After you have defeated the boss, leave the park, and then go inside the farmhouse on the east side of the map. Speak to the residences there for a small event. Leave the farmhouse, and head south, there is **two treasure chest** around the southwest corner of the map. Once you have picked up the two treasures, take the south exit for a short scene. Head west and pick up the **treasure chest** near the small tower and take the southwest exit to go to East Trista Highway. This is a very short area, there are a total of **three treasure chests** you can pick up along with a fishing location to the west, once you go near the bridge an event scene will play out, Rean will notice a bunch of guards being stationed there. Leave Trista Highway by returning to West Celdic Highway and take the southeast exit to Celdic.

[![Trails of cold steel ii west celdic highway.png](./images/51741dcb-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_west_celdic_highway.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_west_celdic_highway.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii east trista highway.png](./images/02a307c0-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_trista_highway.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_trista_highway.png)

blocks.heading: Celdic
blocks.content: [![Trails of cold steel ii celdic.png](./images/856da786-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_celdic.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_celdic.png)
When you enter Celdic, there will be three key event locations for you to visit. They are all marked with a red exclamation mark on the map.

items.label: **Becky**
items.detail: Celdic House (Near West Celdic Highway entrance)

blocks.content: After conversing with the individuals mentioned earlier, an event scene will unfold in Celdic. During this event, Rean purchases a copy of the **Imperial Chronicle Issue #2**. After reading through it and exiting out of the menu, another event scene will trigger.

Next, make your way to the Grand Market. Here, you should buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #2** and **Black Records #2** (**Second Playthrough only**) from Cornette's shop, located at the center of the Grand Market.

Afterwards, head to the Chapel. Speak with the elderly lady, Moulbaix, situated on the west end of the Chapel. She will teach you the recipe for [Fresh Vegetable Juice](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Fresh_Vegetable_Juice "walkthrough/Recipe List").
With these tasks completed, exit the town by heading towards East Celdic Highway.

rows: Cornette's General Goods (Grand Market, center)(Second Playthrough only)
Tarim: Near the Farm on East Celdic Highway

blocks.content: **East Celdic Highway**

[![Trails of cold steel ii east celdic highway.png](./images/c079da12-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_celdic_highway.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_celdic_highway.png)

Head to the northern part of the map to locate a treasure chest containing **Silver Earrings**. Afterward, journey to the northeast corner where the farmhouse is situated. Talk to **Tarim**, an NPC near the farmhouse, who will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II Chapter 1**. These books have a very limited time frame to obtain, so be sure to collect all 14 volumes of Gambler Jack II. Collecting all 14 volumes of Gambler Jack II lets you exchange for the strongest weapon later in the game.

If you happen to miss acquiring a volume of Gambler Jack II, there is still a chance to obtain them by purchasing them from a pawn shop using the **Inspect Curios** function. However, please be aware that this method is unreliable and relies entirely on luck.

Then move to the bridge in the southeast part of the map, a fishing spot can be found. There is also a treasure chest located just a little past the bridge. Open it to trigger an event scene in which Rean discovers an **Old Key**.

Lastly, go to the windmill in the center-south of the map and watch the event scene there. Afterward, [Machias](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Character_Notes#Machias_1 "walkthrough/Character Notes") will join your party. Return to Celdic to continue your journey.

rows: Speak to Rosine after Machias join your party.

blocks.content: While in Celdic, head to the Market Manager's House located in the southwest area of the map. Speak to Manager Otto and read the request. This will add the quest section to your Notebook and introduce you to **AP (Academic Points)**, which are earned based on your choices in each chapter. Earning the maximum AP in each chapter will result in an **S rank**.
Next, visit the Chapel and talk to Rosine. She will provide you with three Tear Balms and add page 1 to her profile. Complete the following request as listed below.
**Note:** Mira from Quest are received at the end of each Act.

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Munch no More
blocks.name: Side Quest: Munch no More
blocks.content: Head to East Celdic Highway 2 and find the quest monster located at the northeast corner of the map. After defeating the monster, you will be given the choice to either instantly return to Celdic or stay where you are.

Choose to return to Celdic and report to Manager Otto at the Market Manager's House. As a reward for completing this quest, you will receive the **Detection Quartz**. It's a good idea to always keep the Detection Quartz equipped as it will display all the treasure chests on the mini-map.

blocks.name: Giant Crop Muncher
blocks.reward: Reward and AP, Detection, 1500 Mira, 4 AP

blocks.content: [![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

blocks.heading: Story Quest: Herbal Remedies
blocks.name: Story Quest: Herbal Remedies
blocks.content: Head to the Celdic Chapel and speak to Father Zirbel behind the altar. Then go to the Grand Market and speak to Flint by the stall on the northwest side. Afterward, leave town by going to West Celdic Highway. Continue north until you reach near the Lunaria Nature Park Entrance. Speak to Johnson, the NPC near the gate. Enter [Lunaria Nature Park](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_1_Part_1#Lunaria_Nature_Park "walkthrough/Act 1 Part 1") and find the Cure Herb located at the northeast corner of the map near a treasure chest. Once you pick up the herb, you will be given the option to either instantly return to Celdic or stay where you are. Choose to return to Celdic and give the Cure Herb to Father Zirbel to complete the quest.

[![Trails of cold steel ii cure herb.jpg](./images/db9cc935-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_cure_herb.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_cure_herb.jpg)

rows: Teara Balm x2, Celestial Balm x2, 4 AP

blocks.content: [![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

After you have finished the request listed above, exit out of Celdic by going to East Celdic Highway and then enter the Windmill at the south area of the map. Examine the communication device, select the second choice to advance the story forward. After the event scene, you will need to rendezvous at Point D with your party members. Point D is located on East Celdic Highway 3. You can go to East Celdic Way 3 by taking the east exit of East Celdic Highway 2.
**East Celdic Highway 3**

[![Trails of cold steel ii east celdic highway 3.png](./images/fc519f45-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_celdic_highway_3.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_celdic_highway_3.png)

Pick up the **Sepith Mass** at the treasure chest directly at the northeast corner. Then head for **Point D** immediately, because you will get two party members to join you. **Point D is Located at the Northeast end of the map.** When Eliot and Fie join your party, the game will let you know that the [Overdrive](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough#Overdrive "walkthrough") function will only work between Rean and his friends, for the rest of the class, you will need to overcome trials found in Monster Chest to use the Overdrive function between them. Now that you have a full group, the game will let you know use the Burst function during Link attacks and also the ability to switch party members in battle. Go back west to the center area, your next destination is the Twin Dragons Bridge, which is located at the southeast exit and the southwest exit. If you take the southwest exit, you will find a Monster Chest that contains a **Gladiator Headband**. Pick up all the treasure chests on the southwest area of East Celdic Highway 3. At the **southwest end of the map lies a blue treasure chest**. These treasure chests are known as **Trial Chest**, it's a monster chest that forces you to use a prearranged party, if you clear it, you will unlock the Overdrive function between them and also some Link EXP. For the upcoming Trial Chest, it is highly recommended to equip Faint Resistant accessory for the fight, it will make your life much easier. When your done take the Southeast exit to Twin Dragons Bridge.

blocks.heading: Twin Dragons Bridge
rows: Morize: Twin Dragons Bridge - Waiting Lounge
Head to Celdic East Highway 2 after you have seen an event scene with a merchant and a soldier arguing.

blocks.content: Watch the Key event, and head to the waiting lounge which is located the north side of the map. When you're inside, speak to the girl **Morize** on the northwest corner, she will teach you the **Cheese Omelet** recipe. Now exit out of the building and then go near the bridge to trigger an event scene with a **merchant arguing with a soldier**. After this, you can do a hidden quest.

blocks.heading: Hidden Quest: A Cry For Help
blocks.name: Hidden Quest: A Cry For Help
blocks.content: To start this hidden quest, you need to leave Twin Dragons Bridge after witnessing the event where Merchant Albel argues with the soldier. Head north until you're close to Celdic East Highway 2, and an event scene will trigger.

You will encounter the Merchant on [East Celdic Highway 3](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_1_Part_1#East_Celdic_Highway_3 "walkthrough/Act 1 Part 1"), near the location where you found the Chest containing 100 Sepith Mass. Engage and defeat the monsters in this area to complete the quest. Afterward, select the first choice to return instantly to Twin Dragons Bridge.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

Go back to **Waiting Lounge** and speak to the **three merchants** located on the right, left and center (they are all marked with a red exclamation mark). Then go to the east side of the building, this will trigger an event scene. After you have finished all side activities, examine the duct to advance the story forward. Just keep moving inside the duct it will eventually lead you outside, go to the east exit, and then take the east exit again to go to the Garrelia side of Twin Dragons Bridge.
**Twin Dragons Bridge - Garrelia Side**

[![Trails of cold steel ii twin dragons bridge garrelia.png](./images/a8540489-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_twin_dragons_bridge_garrelia.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_twin_dragons_bridge_garrelia.png)

Take the southeast exit to go Garrelia Byroad. Take the north exit that is very close to the entrance, this will take you back to the Garrelia Side, in here you can find a merchant right under the bridge. You can buy the costume attachment item **"Contact Lens"** from him instead of exchanging it with U-Material for later. Return by to Garrelia Byroad, go east until the path split, you can then go northwest to find a Celestial Balm in a treasure chest. Continue east, when the path split, you can go to the north end to find a **Defense 2** quartz in a treasure box. Then return back and go to the east path, eventually, it will go south, in here you can find a treasure on the west end and also a two treasure chests on the east side along with Trial Chest. When you clear the monster in the Trial Chest, you can use Overdrive function for Eliot and Fie.

Now continue southeast and you will find a treasure chest near the south exit. Take the south exit to go Garrelia Byroad 2. Go east and when the path split, go south to find a **Holy Chain** in a treasure chest. Return and continue east, and when the path split, go all the way south to find an optional area. Go inside to enter the **Terra Shrine**.
**Terra Shrine**
Head downstairs, and open the gate to enter the main area of the Spirit Cave.

[![Trails of cold steel ii terra shrine.png](./images/2deb8152-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine.png)
Go west and then take the stairs go to the south end to find a **Trial Chest**. When you cleared the Trial, you will unlock the Overdrive function between **Fie and Machias**.

blocks.name: Giant Amalgam
blocks.strategy: Then go to the north side of the map, you can find a **Seal Quartz** at the south east of the map, then continue on by taking the northwest path. It will eventually lead to a dead end, from here go to the southeast area to find a switch, press it to raise the stairs to access the south area. Go the west area, pick up the **Tearal Balm** right near the Giant Beetle, then go west, head to the north end to find a monster chest. Defeat the monster inside to get the **Septium Vein** quartz. Now go to the south end of the map, you will find a switch just past the Giant Beetle. Press the switch, it will raise the stairs letting you access to the boss area on the west end. Defeating the boss will give you **three AP**. Now take the elevator and leave.

blocks.name: Tildawn Gaia x3
blocks.strategy: When your back at Garrelia Byroad 2, go back up north and then go east to find an **EP Charge**. Then continue on by going southeast, when the path split again, go all the way to the southeast end to find a monster chest with the **Reaper Quartz**. Then return north and go all the way to the northeast end to find the entrance to Garrelia Fortress. Use the Orbment Station and save your game before you enter.

blocks.content: After this, you will participate in another boss battle.

rows: Arbekker: Garrelia Proving Ground - Resting Area

blocks.content: When you can control Rean again, head to the Resting Area which is the building located at the north side of the map. Speak to Arbekker and he will give you a copy of [![TrailsbookiconZ.png](./images/20a18a0b-TrailsbookiconZ.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:TrailsbookiconZ.png) **Gambler Jack II - Chapter II**. You can also find Monica (General Store) and Munk (Dining tables Southeast) on this map. Speaking to them doesn't add a character note, but it will put their profiles into your notebook. When you all ready to go examine Valimar and pick the first choice to advance the story.

blocks.name: Event
blocks.content:
Once you have control over Rean, the game will let you know about [bonding events](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough#Bonding_Events "walkthrough"). Bonding events are highlighted with a **yellow exclamation mark** on the map. Bonding events will reveal additional backstory for the character you are attending and improve your relationship with them. To attend a Bonding Event, you need Bonding Points. You are only given a limited amount of Bonding Points, which makes it impossible to see all of them on the first playthrough. However, you can get additional Bonding Points on New Game+ playthroughs.

Attend the bonding events, doing Machias and Claire's bonding event will add a page to their profiles.

rows: Purchase the Tomato Jelly Recipe Book from the General Store.
Speak to Alf & Kiki near the Station.
Add Page 1 to Claire's Character Profile.Link EXP +500
Add Page 1 to Machias' Character Profile.Link EXP +500

blocks.content: Now go to the general store and purchase the **Tomato Jelly** recipe. If you leave town by the southeast exit, you can play the [snowboard](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Mini_Games#Snowboarding "walkthrough/Mini Games") mini game. The snowboard mini game will give you prizes depending on your performance of each course. There is an **hidden quest** you can do, speak to Alf and Kiki near the Station.

blocks.heading: Hidden Quest: Leaf it to Me
blocks.name: Hidden Quest: Leaf it to Me
blocks.content: To initiate this quest, interact with either Alf or Kiki, they're the two kids near the station. Choose the first dialogue option to offer your assistance. After accepting the quest, exit out of town and head to Ymir Valley.

In Ymir Valley, you need to find two different types of colored leaves for Alf and Kiki. The first leaf is located at the northwest corner of Ymir Valley 1. The second leaf can be found in the upper southeast corner of Ymir Valley 2, near a treasure chest. Once you have collected both leaves, return to Alf and Kiki to complete the quest.
Please note that there is a monkey-like monster in Ymir Valley, so be sure to scan it if you want to complete the Battle Trophy.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

After you finish all side activities, head to your room at the Baron's mansion, and pick the first choice to end part 1. The game will then accumulate all the AP you have earned throughout the chapter. You will get a S-Rank if you manage to get a total of **35 AP**.

rows: Put up a fight against Xeno and Leonidas

blocks.heading: December 5th
blocks.content: Leave town through **Ymir Valley**. Select two members from Class VII, and one guest character (Claire or Toval) to bring with you. You won't have the option to select your party member after the decision is set, so make sure you chose your ideal team.
**Nord Highlands - South, Part: A**

[![Trails of cold steel ii nord highlands south.png](./images/90783124-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_nord_highlands_south.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_nord_highlands_south.png)

rows: Old Lady Jedah: Lake Lacrima - Elder's Camp

blocks.content: After the event scene, your party will be warp to the northwest area of **Nord Highlands - South**. Since the Nord Highlands is really big, use the map above as a reference of all the treasure chest. When you reach the middle section an event scene will occur, then go southwest to **Zender Gate**. Watch the event, you will receive a horse for you to ride on. Go back inside Zender Gate and speak to **Marx** at the Mess Hall, he will teach you the [Potato Croquette](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Potato_Croquette "walkthrough/Recipe List") recipe and purchase new weapons from Zender Gate, but not armor because there is stronger equipment in the upcoming area (Lake Lacrima). You can also find some of your classmates here, there is Beryl at the Mess Hall and Mint who is just outside of Zender Gate. Now leave Zender Gate, the game won't let you access the southeast area yet, so wait for later if you intend on picking up the treasure chests. Now go to the **Nord Settlement** located at the **northeast end** of the map. A boss battle will ensue afterwards.
**Lake Lacrima**

After the event scene, **Gaius** will join your party. Head to **Elder's House** and speak to Old Lady **Jedah**, she will teach you the [Hot Milk Tea](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Hot_Milk_Tea "walkthrough/Recipe List") recipe. Then go to the **Doctor's House**, and speak to San the girl right next to Dr. Amr, she will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 3**. Now also, purchase a copy of **Gambler Jack Reprint #3** at the general store. You can also fish on the pier near the boat. When you all finish to go, leave Lake Lacrima to Nord Highlands - North.
**Nord Highlands - North**

You need to go to **Nord Highlands - Northeast**, that is location is located by the **southeast exit**. Gaius will prevent you from going to the south region of the map, so just go directly to your destination.

[![Trails of cold steel ii nord highlands north.png](./images/ae3ec63f-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_nord_highlands_north.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_nord_highlands_north.png)
**Nord Highlands - Northeast**

Go east all the way to the end, when the path change direction, head to the south corner to find a Floral Bottle in a treasure chest and then continue on north. An event scene and a boss battle will occur.

blocks.name: Unsurtr
blocks.strategy: This boss isn't particularly challenging, but it does have a substantial amount of HP. With a full party, Alisa can use her craft, "Heavenly Gift," which will automatically regenerate your CP and provide the "Insight" buff. This allows you to easily dodge some of the boss's attacks. The boss is weak against fire-based attacks, so Fire arts, such as "Heatwave," equipped on Alisa, work effectively. Using all of your party's S-Crafts can quickly take down the boss without much trouble. Be cautious of the boss's strongest attack, "Frost Edge," which it can cast rapidly, potentially causing the Freeze ailment on your party. In the worst-case scenario, you can equip freeze freeze-resistant accessory before the fight starts.

blocks.content: After the event scene, your party will be back in Lake Lacrima. The game will add the option to let you instantly travel to other parts of the Nord Highlands when you're outside on the navigation menu. There will be a bunch of side activities you can do, first go to the Elder's House and speak to the elder, he will give you a list of side quests for you to do. You can also explore some parts of the Nord Highlands that the game prevent you from going to earlier, allowing you pick up some of the treasure chests that you were missing. When you are exploring the Nord Highlands - North, you should also open the Trial Chest located at the center of the map, doing so will unlock the Overdrive function for Alisa & Millium. After this, you should work on the side quests.

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Highlands Hunt
blocks.name: Side Quest: Highlands Hunt
blocks.content:
Highlands Hunt / 高原に放たれた軍用魔獣
Enemy Name, Item Drop 1, Item Drop 2, Galion Cougar, Red Beast Flesh, U-Material
Item Drop 1, Item Drop 2
Red Beast Flesh, U-Material
Lacan
Nord Bracelet, All Monster Ingredient x3, 1500 Mira, 4 AP

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Foaling Around
blocks.name: Side Quest: Foaling Around
blocks.content:
Foaling Around / 子馬の捜索
Enemy Name, Item Drop 1, Item Drop 2, Golden Owl, Fresh Egg, Hearty Powder, Grass Mole, Red Beast Flesh, Globby Fat, Diving Ananta, White Beast Flesh, Globby Fat, Stony Croaker, White Beast Flesh, Chitinous Shell, Stone Golem, Chitinous Shell, U-Material

Food Ingredient x3, 2000 Mira, 4 AP
Return back to the Nord Highlands - Northeast, and explore Aria Shrine located at the northwest exit. Clearing it will give you **3 AP**.
**Note:** There is a fishing spot near the entrance to Aria Shrine.
**Aria Shrine**

[![Trails of cold steel ii aria shrine.png](./images/9ba8610f-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aria_shrine.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aria_shrine.png)
Head downstairs, and open the gate to enter Aria Shrine. then follow the path northwest, you will find a Trial Chest for Alisa and Gaius.

blocks.name: Emerald Ooze G
blocks.strategy: After you have cleared the Trial Chest, climb up the ladder that is behind you. Then go to the southwest path, if you reach to the very corner, you will find an **Aerial** quartz in a treasure chest. Then go back to the center area and take the ladder down. Go north to the center, you will notice three switches, press the switch on the west side, it will lower the platform. Then go to the west end to find a **Sleep** Quartz. Run back and flip the same switch again to raise the platform. Then go to the center, and pick up the treasure chest on the north, which contains an **EP Charge II**. Then flip the switch to raise the platform. Then go to the east side, press the switch to lowered the platform, now climb up the ladder in front of you. Then go all the way west, open the chest to find some **Sepith Mass**, then go southwest to find the [Criminal](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Criminal "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") **Master Quartz** in a Monster Chest. Then head all the way to the north end, use the Orbment Charging Station and then open the gate to fight the boss.

blocks.name: Tildawn - Pazuu x3
blocks.strategy: This can be a pretty tough battle if you came unprepared. This boss is focused on using it's powerful area attack skills which can cause your party to fall asleep. If you have sleep resistant accessories, equip them before you come for this fight. Each boss can cast Aerial (a very powerful wind art). This does a ton of damage and can instantly K.O. party members. Another thing to bring is someone that can Impede, this will cancel their arts. As long as your party members are awake, you should able to cancel their cast and breeze through the fight.

blocks.content: **Nord Highlands - South, Part: B**

rows: Speak to Officer Zats or Manning at Zender Gates, store area.
Officer Ogrum: Zender Gates, store area.

blocks.content: Head to the Nord Highlands - South, and then go to Zender Gates. Then speak to Officer Zats or Manning near the store area. Accept their offer to start a hidden quest. Then speak to Officer Ogram by the group officers, he will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 4**. Explore the southern part of Nord Highlands and pick up whatever treasure chest you have missed including the **Trial Chest** at the southeast area of the map.

blocks.heading: Hidden Quest: Zats Amore
blocks.name: Hidden Quest: Zats Amore
blocks.content: Speak to Zats or Manning near the store area of Zender Gates. Accept their request and then head to Nord [Nord Highlands - South](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_1_Part_2#Nord_Highlands_South "walkthrough/Act 1 Part 2"). You'll need to examine the wreckage of each tank marked on the map with a green exclamation mark. In each wreckage, you'll find a shiny object to collect. When you examine the object in the 4th wreckage, you'll discover a pendant. Return to Zender Gate and give the pendant to Zats.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

At this point, if you've completed all the activities mentioned above, continue with the main story. Head to Nord Highlands - South and go to the southeast corner of the map. You should see a **red exclamation mark** on the map indicating the location. Millium will put out a ladder for you. Climb up the ladder and move to the end, then select the first choice when you're ready to proceed.
**Watchtower**

[![Trails of cold steel ii watchtower a.png](./images/6cf0dbb9-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_watchtower_a.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_watchtower_a.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii watchtower b.png](./images/7bd821ab-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_watchtower_b.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_watchtower_b.png)

As soon as you enter the tower, you will be facing some Alliance Forces Soldiers, these guys can a little hard but they are very weak against status ailments. Just hit them with a craft skill that will cause Seal and they will be pretty much useless. After you have defeated the soldiers, use the Orbment Charging Station in front of you to fully recover yourself. Then head to the southeast path to find a **Wind Shoes** in a treasure chest. Return back to the starting area and go to the north path. Go all the way to the end, examine the duct, and go to the end to find a **La Forte** quartz. Return back the previous area, and take the stairs up. Then go to the room on the northwest side of the map, open the treasure to get some **Sepith**, then take the southeast path to go upstairs. Then as you try to go north, a group of mercenaries will come after you. Defeat them and move on. You can examine the ducts at the northeast corner, going to end, you will find a **Attack 2** quartz. Return to the previous area and then take the stairs up. Go south, and there is an **EP Charge II** on the southeast room Then take the northeast path to the end, you will be surrounded by another group of mercenaries. Defeat them and head to the northeast end, you will find an Orbment Charging Station. Heal, save and then head outside. Go to the rooftop to fight the boss.

blocks.heading: December 8
rows: Purchase the Onion Soup Recipe Book from the General Store.
Speak to Camilla at the General Store.

blocks.content: Once you have control over Rean, Go to the general store and speak Camilla to accept the hidden quest. Then speak to her again, purchase the **Onion Soup** recipe and a copy of **Imperial Chronicle Issue #3**. Then enter the house located southeast right beside the tavern. Speak to Masha by the kitchen, she will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 5**. There is also a new difficulty level added to the [snowboard](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Mini_Games#Snowboarding "walkthrough/Mini Games") mini game. Complete it to receive the **Hare** quartz.

blocks.name: Event
blocks.content: Then speak to Claire southeast of the Baron's Mansion. This will add a page to her profile. Then attend the bonding events, doing Sharon and Toval's bonding event will add a page to their profiles. Then finish the hidden quest. If you decide to head out to Ymir Valley, there is a monster called Snow Rat added to the area, so scan that monster if want the battle trophy.

rows: Speak to Claire, southeast of the Baron's Mansion.
Add Page 1 to Sharon's Character Profile.Link EXP +500
Add Page 2 to Toval's Character Profile.Link EXP +500

blocks.heading: Hidden Quest: Azuki's Adventure
blocks.name: Hidden Quest: Azuki's Adventure
blocks.content: Speak to Camilla at the General Store, and accept her request by choosing the first option. To complete the quest, you'll need to talk to the following four NPCs:
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

Once you have completed all the activities mentioned above, return to your room to conclude Act 1- Part 2. The game will then tally up all the AP (Academic Points) you have earned throughout the chapter. You will achieve an S-Rank if you manage to accumulate a **total of 35 AP**.

rows: Found and explored the Aria Shrine

blocks.heading: December 9
blocks.content: Select your party members. By now, if you've been fishing, you should have ranked up. You can obtain a **new fishing rod from Annabelle**, who is at the general store. Make your preparations and exit town via Ymir Valley. Choose two members from Class VII and one guest character (Claire, Sharon, or Toval) to accompany you. Once the decision is made, you won't have the option to change your party members. This is the only segment in the game where you can use Sharon. If you don't bring her along, you'll miss this chance until you start a new playthrough.
A recommended party would include Alisa and Sharon since Sharon possesses some formidable crafts, and Alisa can serve as a CP battery, making them a very strong pair.
**Ebel Highway**

[![Trails of cold steel ii ebel highway.png](./images/97da78e8-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ebel_highway.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ebel_highway.png)

You will end up at Ebel Highway 2. Pick up the **Flame Tongue** quartz near Valimar. Then head directly to Legram by going south. The game won't let you fully explore Ebel Highway yet, so pick up the rest of the treasure chests later.
**Legram**

[![Trails of cold steel ii legram.png](./images/fcbef3dc-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_legram.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_legram.png)

rows: From this point onward, it becomes possible to do Parameter Stacking. Depending on the bosses you are to fight, different combinations will be used. For detailed references, check the Advance Strategy - Stacking (In-Depth) part of the Nightmare Strategies Section at the end of this guide.

With Stacking available, you must begin keeping at all times specific pieces of armor/boots to fulfill particular purposes. In this case, keeping 1 or 2 Jackets for both genders and some Breeze and Cloud Shoes (all of them bought at Lake Lacrima), will begin to help you build your Task Equipment.

blocks.content: Watch the event scene at the Bracer Guild. Then go to Aprikoze Inn and speak to Weiber behind the counter, he will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 6**. Then take the back door to outside and speak to Old Man Bem, he will teach you the [Seafood Pilaf](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Seafood_Pilaf "walkthrough/Recipe List") recipe. Then head to the general store and purchase **Gambler Jack Reprint #4**, and stock up on new equipment. You could also find some of the Thors Academy students in Legram, there is **Vivi** at the Church, and **Casper** at the Training School. If you go to the harbor, you can find a fishing spot near Klaus. When you are ready, speak to Klaus, this will take you Lohengrin Castle. Climb up the hill and go inside Lohengrin Castle, you will fight a boss shortly after.

blocks.name: Encounter
blocks.strategy: This boss is quite easy compared to what you have previously fought. The boss has a strong area attack skill that can cause poison. However, you should able to defeat this boss before it becomes a hassle. Since the boss has a very poor slash resistant, you can easily deal a lot of damage to it with a Slash type character like Laura and Rean. The boss is also weak against Mirage arts, which Emma has already equipped. Status ailments also work pretty well against this boss. If Sharon is on your party, this boss will become super easy, because she has an area healing craft that remove all status ailments and high damage crafts.

blocks.content: Afterwards, you will watch an event scene then Laura and Emma will join your party. Now head to the Bracer Guild located at the southeast area of town. Speak to Miles, he will hand you some side quests.

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Arseid School Bout 2
blocks.name: Side Quest: Arseid School Bout 2
blocks.content:
Arseid School Bout 2 / 続 - 門下生との手合わせ
Boss, HP, Elemental Efficacy, Item Drop, Slash, Trust, Pierce, Strike, Fritz, 36352 (Normal), 100, 100, 100, 100, N/A, ★★☆☆, ★★☆☆, ★★☆☆, ★★☆☆, Ares, 27440 (Normal), 100, 100, 100, 100, N/A, ★★☆☆, ★★☆☆, ★★☆☆, ★★☆☆, Gaveli, 36707 (Normal), 100, 100, 100, 100, N/A, ★★☆☆, ★★☆☆, ★★☆☆, ★★☆☆, Datt, 27440 (Normal), 100, 100, 100, 100, N/A, ★★☆☆, ★★☆☆, ★★☆☆, ★★☆☆, This boss fight can be easy or tough. Each student is very weak against status ailments, Laura has a good chance of causing faint on them and with Rean's Gale, you pretty much Seal them to prevent them from doing any action. The students are also easily blind. So if you have some way of inflicting those status ailments, then use it on them. If the student HP gets low, they will be starting using this buff that will heal them and boost their strength greatly. During this phase, it can get really dangerous if they use their area skills it can do over 5000 damage. You could be instantly K.O.if you multiple students using the same skill on you. You can cheese through this fight by using your S-Craft with everyone, but you might want to drag this battle out if you intend on analyzing them.

blocks.name: Side Quest: Ebel Rebel
blocks.content:
Ebel Rebel / エベル街道の手配魔獣
Boss, HP, Elemental Efficacy, Item Drop, Slash, Trust, Pierce, Strike, Gordi Schnarr G, 98467 (Normal), 120, 100, 140, 100, 100, 100, 100, N/A, ★★☆☆, ★☆☆☆, ★☆☆☆, ★☆☆☆, Boss Skills, Slam. Area (M). Can be Cancelled., Suggested Formation, Spread 1, Spread 2, This boss has a ton of HP, it is also crazy strong. The boss will use a skill called drumming which will heal itself and greatly buff it's attack, defense, and speed. Allowing it to strike you multiple times, this means the boss can wipe your party fast. Not only does it hit hard, but it can also cause faint on your party with each attack. The worst part is when the bosses buff is about to expire it will use a skill called Hard Hit which can deal nearly 7000 damage to each member which makes this boss harder than anything you have encountered so far. The most effective way of killing this boss is to rely on flame type arts. It does the most amount of damage without using Crafts. You can also use Overdrive for an instant magic cast. Once you take out about half its HP, you can have your party spam their S-Craft before the boss has a chance to heal itself from its buff.

blocks.name: Quest
blocks.content: After you have finished the two side quest above, go back to [Ebel Highway](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_1_Part_3#Ebel_Highway "walkthrough/Act 1 Part 3"). Then take north exit to Ebel Highway 2. You can examine Valimar for a short event. When you are ready, go to the northeast exit you will end up in Ebel Highway 3.
**Ebel Highway 3**

[![Trails of cold steel ii ebel highway 3.png](./images/29abb604-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ebel_highway_3.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ebel_highway_3.png)

When you reach _Ebel Highway 3_, you should head for the northwest exit of the map, it will take you to _Aqua Shrine_. Clearing the Aqua Shrine will give you **three extra AP**. There is also a fishing spot near the waterfall by the Aqua Shrine.
**Aqua Shrine**

[![Trails of cold steel ii aqua shrine.png](./images/6b578b24-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aqua_shrine.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aqua_shrine.png)

Head downstairs, open the gate to enter the Aqua Shrine. Follow the west path until you reach to the **northwest corner**, you will find a **switch**. Press it to lower the water level. Then follow the west path. Go all the way to the east end to find a **Trial Chest for Laura and Emma**. Defeat the Trial Chest Boss and move on.

blocks.name: King Crysnetic
blocks.strategy: Follow the south path, when you see a pair of stairs, take the north one path, you will find a monster chest at the center of the map. A **Scent** quartz is found inside. Now backtrack and go to the stairs at the south end, you will find a pair of **Blue Scaled Shoes** in a treasure box. Then follow all the way to the west side of the map to see a treasure chest and a switch. Open the chest to find an EP Charge II, then push the switch to raise the water up. Now take the path at the center, it should take to the northwest area to the boss.

blocks.name: Tildawn Glacia x3
blocks.strategy: This fight is similar to the previous incarnation of Tildawns that you have previously encountered. It does exactly the same thing by spamming area attack skills, only this time it causes Mute. This fight will only bring a lot of trouble if you bring a whole party dependent on magic. Just make sure you cancel the boss's magic-casting by using a character with Impede on their crafts ability. If you want to cheese through this fight, you can use Rean, turn on Overdrive and use Motivate twice and have the entire party use their S-Craft.

blocks.content: After you have defeated the boss, take the portal to exit out of Aqua Shrine. Collect all the treasure chest in Ebel Highway 3 if you haven't yet. Then take the **northeast exit** to **South Kreuzen Highway**.
**South Kreuzen Highway**

[![Trails of cold steel ii south kreuzen highway.png](./images/49a89654-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_south_kreuzen_highway.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_south_kreuzen_highway.png)

Keep moving, until you reach to the bridge for a short scene. Then head to the northwest corner to find a **fishing spot** at the north corner, and a **Hydro Cannon** quartz on the opposite end. Then continue north, and at the northeast corner you will find some **Sepith Mass** in a treasure chest. Then go to the north region of the map, when the path split, you can find a **Tearal Balm** on the west side, and a [Tauros](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Tauros "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") **Master Quartz** in the monster chest on the east side. Then return to the center path, and take the north exit to Bareahard.

blocks.name: Quest
blocks.content: Going to Bareahard will automatically advance the story, so make sure you have finish all the side quests from Legram before you enter.
**Bareahard**

[![Trails of cold steel ii bareahard.png](./images/f8080cec-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_bareahard.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_bareahard.png)

rows: Underground Waterway, after defeating the Abyss Drome. (Second Playthrough only)
Speak to Eva at Central Plaza, near Underground Waterway.
Speak to Sister Tatiana at Bareahard Cathedral

blocks.content: There is a list of things for you to do in Bareahard, you should head to the clothing store (**Valenty Tailoring on Artisan's Street**), purchase the **Patterned Shirt** and the **Leather Sandal** equipment from there. The Patterned Shirt has the highest evasion bonus in the game (20%), which is the best equipment for players that want to make a dodge tank type character for later (Fie and Sharon can easily hit a 100% dodge rate with these making them immune to physical attacks for end game.) The Leather Sandal has a very high speed rating at this point of the game.

rows: You can take the opportunity to purchase the following accessories from Turner's at Artisan Street:Red Pendulum x3 (You already have one from the 'A Cry For Help' hidden quest in Act 1 - Part 1)Green Pendulum x3 (One of them can be found in the Underground Waterway)Blue Pendulum x4Yellow Pendulum x4Dark Pendulum x4Each of these accessories costs 3,000 Mira, so you'll need a total of 54,000 Mira to buy them all. While it may take some time, you can use Sharon's cooking abilities to make Tri-colored Onigiri and sell them to gather the necessary Mira if you don't have enough from selling Sepith Mass. This will ensure that you have protection against all possible negative status effects and debuffs.

blocks.content: Then go inside **Turner's Jewelers (Northwest building on Artisan's Street)** and speak to Colette. Leave, the building and take the north exit to the **Central Plaza**. Go inside the **Sorciere Restaurant** at the northeast corner. Then speak to Calmin by the Northwest counter, he will teach you the [Fluffy Pancake](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Fluffy_Pancake "walkthrough/Recipe List") recipe. Exit out of the restaurant and take the east exit to **Station Street**. Speak to the maid, **Saffron** near Christie's Galleria, she will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 7**. Then go inside **Christie's Galleria** and go to the second floor to book store (**Fortnum Books**) and purchase the **Gambler Jack Reprint #5**, **6**. Then speak to Theresia by the bench. Then work on the hidden side quest listed below.

blocks.heading: Hidden Quest: Missin' Kitten
blocks.name: Hidden Quest: Missin' Kitten
blocks.content: [![Trails of cold steel ii missin kitten eva.jpg](./images/7bc3417e-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_missin_kitten_eva.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_missin_kitten_eva.jpg)
Head to Bareahard's Central Plaza and then go downstairs near the Underground Waterway. Speak to Old Lady Eva, and choose the first option to offer your assistance.
After that, talk to the following NPCs, each of whom is marked with a green exclamation mark:

items.label: **Hasan**
items.detail: Located at the dining tables by Sorciere Restaurant in Central Plaza.

items.label: **Biske**
items.detail: Found on Artisan's Street near the entrance of South Kreuzen Highway.

items.label: **Female Student**
items.detail: Located on Station Street (at the center of the map).

blocks.content: Once you've spoken to the mentioned NPCs in Bareahard, exit the city by heading to North Kreuzen Highway. There, you will find the Missing Kitten at the north end of the map.

[![Trails of cold steel ii north kreuzen highway 1.png](./images/53829c9a-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_north_kreuzen_highway_1.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_north_kreuzen_highway_1.png)
**Note:** You cannot access the Fishing Spot. The game will prevent you from reaching the northern side of the bridge. The Fishing Spot is not available until Act 2.
You'll be automatically taken back to Bareahard. Speak to the same cat once more to trigger a short scene with Celine.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

blocks.heading: Hidden Quest: St. Veronica's Tears
blocks.name: Hidden Quest: St. Veronica's Tears
blocks.content:
St. Veronica's Tears / 聖女像の調査 [Hidden Quest]
Boss, HP, Elemental Efficacy, Item Drop, Slash, Trust, Pierce, Strike, Abyss Drome, 88111 (Normal), 100, 160, 160, 180, 80, 180, 160, Clear Gelatin, Curia Balm, ★★★★, ☆☆☆☆, ☆☆☆☆, ☆☆☆☆, Sludge Drome x7, 6264 (Normal), 100, 160, 160, 180, 80, 180, 160, Clear Gelatin, Curia Balm, ★★★★, ☆☆☆☆, ☆☆☆☆, ☆☆☆☆, There is a ton of Dromes here and they all can cast magic that deals a ton of damage. This is one of the easiest to spot to farm Tactical Bonus by canceling each of the Drome's spell casting by using a craft with the Impede function (Rean, Machias, Alisa, Fie), allowing you to get the Tactician trophy. If you find the situation too dangerous, then wipe out the smaller Dromes with your S-Craft or an area spell. blocks.name: Quest
blocks.content: After you have finished the side quests, go to the **Noble District** and walk near the entrance of Duke Albarea Mansion for a short scene. After this visit the **Central Plaza** and go inside Sorciere Restaurant and speak to **Hammond** by the counter. Then head to Station Street and take the south exit to Bareahard Airport. Doing this will advance the story, so make sure you have finished all side activities from earlier.
**Bareahard Airport**
Head inside the airship, go downstairs from the southwest end of the map to the Hold, you will find a **Freeze** Quartz.
Return to the main floor, and take the stairs on your right to the 3F. Open the door directly in front of you to enter the Lounge room. Afterwards, you will play the racing mini game.

[![Trails of cold steel ii orbal bike controls.jpg](./images/503cd40a-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_orbal_bike_controls.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_orbal_bike_controls.jpg)
Beating Jusis on the race will give you **2 AP**. If you lose, you can retry again to get the bonus AP as long as you don't give up.

blocks.name: Jusis
blocks.strategy: Afterwards, you will face another boss battle. If you manage to defeat Duvalie, you will get 3 Extra AP.

blocks.content: If you manage to defeat Duvalie, you will get an alternative scene. Follow with a mech battle.
The game will prompt you to save. Watch the event scene, until Rean is at the hot spring. You are given the choice to pick someone, select that person to have a special event and **600 Link Exp**.

blocks.heading: December 12
blocks.content: [![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

blocks.name: Event
blocks.content:
This is the only day in the game where you have double bonding events for certain characters. For this reason, you are given **7 bonding points**.

Attend the bonding events, doing Alisa, Emma, Fie, Laura, Millium and Sharon's event will add a page to their profiles. Attending Gaius' bonding event will teach him the Hunter Wing ability instead of reaching to level 75. There is also a new difficulty level added to the snowboard mini game. Clearing the course will get you the **Passion Leggings** accessory and a new snowboard. If you decide to head out to Ymir Valley, there is a monster called **Icicle Penguin** added to the area, scan that monster if you want the battle trophy.

rows: Add Page 1 to Alisa's Character Profile.Link EXP +500
Gaius will Learn Hunter Wing.Link EXP +500
Contained two Bonding EventsAdd Page 1 to Emma's Character Profile. *1st event onlyLink EXP +500
Add Page 1 to Fie's Character Profile.Link EXP +500
Contained two Bonding EventsAdd Page 1 to Laura's Character Profile. *1st event onlyLink EXP +500
Add Page 1 to Millium's Character Profile.Link EXP +500
Add Page 2 to Sharon's Character Profile.Link EXP +500

blocks.content: **Note 1:** Guest characters (Claire, Sharon, Toval) with the **highest link EXP (Must be Link Level 3)** at the end of this act will give you a powerful accessory for Chapter 2.

rows: Attacks/Craft can cancel arts (90% chance). Delay +6

blocks.content: **Note 2:** If this is your second playthrough or higher, you can exchange for a Zemurian Ore Shard (Material to forge the strongest weapon) at the general store at the price of 50 U-Materials
Now go to the Tavern and speak to **Gerald** behind the counter, this will start a hidden quest.

blocks.heading: Hidden Quest: Stranger than Fishin
blocks.name: Hidden Quest: Stranger than Fishin
blocks.content: Head to the Tavern and speak to Gerald behind the counter. Accept his request and leave town by going to Ymir Valley, keep going until you reach Ymir Valley 2. Speak to Annabelle who is located at the center of the map. Now fish at the bridge, once you successfully catch the fish, there will be a boss battle.
Afterwards, you will be returned to town and awarded two quartz, effort and prankster which are helpful for cooking.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

When you have finished all the activities listed above save your game and head to your room to end the day. The game will accumulate all the AP you have earned, you will get an S-Rank if you manage to get a total of **41 AP**.

rows: Found and explored the Aqua Shrine

blocks.name: Rufus
blocks.strategy: This is an unwinnable boss fight, but to fulfill the bonus condition for the extra 3 AP, you must reduce the boss's HP to below 50% within 40 turns. The challenge lies in the boss's exceptionally high defense, which renders regular attacks almost ineffective. The most effective strategy is to enhance your party with Jusis's buffs and unleash a barrage of S-Crafts. If your CP is depleted, resort to using arts. Beware, if the boss manages to cast his arts, it can deal a devastating 17,000 damage to each party member, which will K.O. them in an instant. Therefore, it's crucial to have a character capable of canceling his art casting to prevent this issue. After inflicting a substantial amount of damage, the boss will employ his S-Craft to instantly decimate your entire party.

blocks.content: Following this encounter, you'll engage in another mech battle, but it's also an unwinnable one. After this fight, the chapter will conclude.
**The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II**
After you have finished the event scene , visit each room. They are all marked with a **red exclamation mark** on the map.

After you have spoken to all the everyone listed above, move to the second floor and go north to the guest room. Knock on the door. Watch the event, after this scene, Rean will get the **Spirit Unification** ability. Head downstairs and go to your room (South Area, Southwest corner). Examine the air ducts by the flower vase. Go all the way to the end, after this, you will be facing a few battles.

blocks.name: Encounter
blocks.strategy: This is the same type of soldiers you fought at the watchtower. The soldiers actually can do a ton of damage and can even heal themselves with arts. Best thing to do is use Alfin's arts, it should deal enough damage to destroy them in three blows. You should cancel the Soldier's casting with Rean's Autumn Leaf Cutter when the opportunity comes. When Rean's HP drops very low, use Alfin to heal him.

blocks.content: [![Trails of cold steel ii pantagruel.png](./images/63320756-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_pantagruel.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_pantagruel.png)

After defeating the soldiers, continue along the linear path. You'll come across two rooms. Go to the room to the west to find a **Celestial Balm**, and the room to the east for an **Orange Cape**. Return to the main path and you'll encounter another group of soldiers. Defeat them and continue. When you reach the Orbment Charging Station at the southern end, make sure to heal up and enter the room for an upcoming boss fight.

blocks.name: Duvalie
blocks.strategy: There isn't much to note about this boss fight. Just ensure that you scan both of the bosses. You only need to reduce about 50% of either boss's health to win. Using an S-Craft will do nearly enough damage to finish the fight. After that, a few more regular attacks should bring the battle to an end.

blocks.name: Crow
blocks.strategy: A pretty easy boss fight, you just exchange attacks with Crow. If you see a turn order bonus like critical, use your S-Craft during this moment. When Crow's HP drop below 50%, make sure your HP is higher than 7000, Crow might use his S-Craft and can kill you instantly if your HP is too low.

blocks.content: Watch the opening sequence, the guest character with the **highest Link EXP (Must be level 3)** will give you an powerful accessory.

rows: Attacks/Craft can cancel arts (90% chance). Delay +6

blocks.content: Read the quest list at the computer terminal, and assemble your party. Gaius will be a mandatory member.

rows: If you need to use the Tri-colored Onigiri trick, use Emma.From now on, spend your mira and sepith only on the four characters you intend to take with you to face the Act boss. (I.E. Don't invest in the support characters unless you plan to use them.) Swap equipment and quartz among the support characters to ensure they gain experience. This way, you can minimize your mira and sepith expense while still keeping your equipment and quartz up-to-date. When the story requires you to use specific characters, simply transfer their armor, boots, and quartz. Try to save as much mira and sepith as possible until further notice

blocks.heading: December 15
blocks.content: **Courageous**
Explore the airship. The Courageous will be your new base of operation. Now go to the locations marked with a **red exclamation mark**.

*   George and Valimar at the 1st Floor. After this event Rean can use his Spirit Unification at the cost of 100 CP.
*   You can speak to Millium at the Cafeteria **(2nd Floor)** for a short event. And also play the Blade Mini Game at the leisure room. Regardless of if you win or lose playing will raise your Link EXP by 100.
*   Visit Princess Alfin at the Royal Room.

[![Trails of cold steel ii courageous.jpg](./images/ef0ec130-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_courageous.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_courageous.jpg)
**Courageous's Outline**
**Note:** Not all facility are available at this moment. You will need to recruit some of Thors Academy Students to bring additional functions to Courageous.
**5th Floor - Bridge**

*   **Computer Terminal** - A hub for obtaining new quest and reporting them. Also used for intel on Thors Academy Students.
*   **Captain Towa** - Speaking to Towa will let you rearrange party members, move to another destination or progress the main storyline.
**4th Floor - Assembly Area**
*   **Royal Room** - Speaking to Alfin will let you receive a part of the Phoenix Chapter. These are medals based on your game achievements such as enemy data, friend notes and Quest completion.

rows: Filled in a total of 90 notes in the Friend Notes.

blocks.content: *   **Training Facility** - Fight enemies under certain conditions for U-Materials and other rewards (Master Quartz)
**3rd Floor - Shop Area**

items.label: **Radio Sweepstakes
items.detail: NPC:** Munk — A lottery system, where you wage money and claim prizes after going into random battles.

items.label: **Recipe Gift**
items.detail: Offer recipes to Bridget for rewards.

blocks.content: **2nd Floor - Cafeteria, Multipurpose Area**

*   This is basically the club area, Which range from all sorts of clubs, such as the fishing club, literature, etc. You can even play the Blade Mini game in this area.
*   **Blade** - You can play the Blade Mini Game at the Leisure Room. Doing so will increased the Link EXP between you and your opponent. (Only for the first 5 rounds)
**1st Floor - Engineering Area**

*   **Engineering** - Speaking to George will let you Synthesize new quartz
*   **Hangar** - Let you customize the Orbal Bike, when you examine it. When Clara joins the ship, she will give you function to equip Ex-Orbs on Valimar.

After your finished exploring the ship. Its time for you to find the missing Thors Academy Students and recruit them into Courageous. Speak to Towa and select the destination you want to move to. The choice can be **Ymir**, **Proving Ground**, **Garrelia Fortress**, **Nord Highlands** and **Legram**. Since the game has become non-linear at this point, this guide will start with **Garrelia Camp** first.

[![Trails of cold steel ii world map.jpg](./images/12ae10b1-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_world_map.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_world_map.jpg)

blocks.heading: Searching for Friends (Garrelia Section)
blocks.content: [![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

rows: Speak to Officer Virginie by the truck on the center of the Camp.
Found in the 3rd floor, if you give her Supreme Dishes, she will reward you with some items.If you manage to cook every Supreme Dish, she will reward you with a rare quartz.
Emily will unlocked the Shooting Range Training Facility (4F) for you to use.
Found at the 2nd floor, he works at the cafeteria, letting you buy cooking related products.

blocks.content: Select the Proving Ground, which is the red dot at the middle right corner of the world map. Use the Navigation Menu (Square Button) and press the start button if you need to switch party members or speak to Towa in the Courageous. Bring Laura to your party. Head to the store area and speak to Monica to recruit her to Courageous. You can also find Rex at the center of the camp, speaking to him will add his profile to the Notebook. Then speak to Officer Virginie (the lady by the truck at center), she will teach you the **Tomato Burger Recipe**. Now go take the east exit to the Headquarters. Speak to General Craig to start your side quest.

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Without Leave
blocks.name: Side Quest: Without Leave
blocks.content:
Head to the Garrelia Camp Headquarters (East Building). Speak to General Craig and pick the first choice to accept his request. Leave the building and gather some information. Speak to the NPCs marked with a green exclamation mark. There is one by the lunch table on the southeast corner, the clerks at the resting area and the store area. After you have spoken to those three NPCs, speak to the soldier near the gate exit to the west. Then head out to Garrelia Fortress - Ruins.  
Speak to the Soldiers near the tank at the western side near the Garrelia Byroad exit. Then head to the east end of the map, near the crater, an event will automatically occur and the quest will end.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

[![Trails of cold steel ii garrrelia fortress.png](./images/25e9b868-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_garrrelia_fortress.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_garrrelia_fortress.png)
There is no monster around the area, you can even use your Orbal Bike by Pressing Square at the Navigation Menu. Gather the three treasure chests around the area.
After you pick up all the treasure chests in the map, head to the Trial Chest in the southwest corner of the map. Overcome the trial to unlock the Overdrive function for Fie and Sara.

After this event, head back to Garrelia Fortress, you will notice there is a giant monster near the Crater. These are known as **Cryptid**, defeating them will reward you a special quartz that let you use Lost Arts (The ultimate type of magic). These monsters are recommended for a level 100 party, they can be defeated at level 75+ with the correct setup. If you want to push your luck, you can always give it a shot. Check the [Cryptid](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses "walkthrough/Optional Bosses") section for more information regarding them. Ignore this part for later, if you don't stand a chance. The best time to begin the hunt on an N3 run is when Jusis hits Lv 81 and gets Platinum Shield. Until then, too risky. Better even to wait until all 5 are available (Ch 2-3).

Head out to Garrelia Byroad 2 on the east exit. Travel all the way to Garrelia Byroad 1, and go to where the Trial Chest is, at the northeast corner. You will find **Emily** and **Nicolas**. Speak to them to recruit them to Courageous. Accept their offer, and help them install the relay machine. It's marked on the map with a green exclamation mark. There are 3 points to install at Garrelia Byroad 1, and 3 points to install at Garrelia Byroard 2. When you finished installing all six of them, report to Emily and Nicolas. Then go back to Courageous using the Navigation menu.

[![Trails of cold steel ii garrrelia byroad act 2 part 1.png](./images/12145c02-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_garrrelia_byroad_act_2_part_1.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_garrrelia_byroad_act_2_part_1.png)

blocks.heading: Searching for Friends (Legram Section)
blocks.content: [![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

rows: Replaced one of the Navigation pilot.

blocks.content: Return to Courageous, speak to **Towa** and set your destination to **Legram** (Very bottom of the map). Then go to the General Store, and purchase a copy of the **Imperial Chronicle Issue #4**, and **Gambler Jack Reprint #8**. Then go to the Chapel and speak to **Vivi** in the room to the right (**You need Fie in your party to convince her to join Courageous**). Then go to the Training Hall and go to the room to your left, speak to **Casper**, and speak to him again to recruit him to Courageous (You will need to have a copy of **Imperial Chronicle Issue #4** to convince him).
