Head to the Bracer Guild for a short event scene with Miles and then go to Aprikoze Inn to work on the side quest.

[![Trails of cold steel ii legram.png](./images/fcbef3dc-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_legram.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_legram.png)

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Badass in Danger!!!
blocks.name: Side Quest: Badass in Danger!!!
blocks.content: Head to Aprikoze Inn and speak to the boy with the green hair. To finish the quest, you need to find Patiry who is all the way in Ymir. Patiry is speaking to Luke, the station guard by the pub. Now return to the Courageous and travel to Ymir(Northern section of the map). Once there, go and speak to Patiry near the station guard to finish the side quest
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

blocks.heading: Ymir
blocks.content: [![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

After finishing the Side Quest, head to the General Store, purchase the **Gambler Jack Reprint #9**, and the recipe book for [Crunchy Rice Cracker](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Crunchy_Rice_Cracker "walkthrough/Recipe List"). There is also a new course added to the Snow Board Mini game, and you can also go to Ymir Valley to catch any fish you have previously missed. Now return to Courageous.

blocks.heading: Searching for Friends (Nord Section)
blocks.content: [![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

rows: Ancient Quarry (Boss Area), after defeating Ginosha-Zanak (Second Playthrough only)
Replaced one of the Navigation pilot.
Speak to Beryl at the Stone Monument at Nord Highlands - South
Added the EX-Orb function for Valimar.

blocks.content: Speak to Towa and change your destination to **Zender Gate** (Top right of the map). Go inside Zender Gate, and head to the north end of the map and speak to Tank Officer Hoover, he will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 8**. Then leave Zender Gate. You can find **Beryl** at the stone monument (Northwest corner of the map), speaking to her will update her character profile. If you miss this chance to speak to her, you can also find her later in Legram (December 19) and Terra Shrine (December 23). Afterwards, use the Quick Navigation menu, and go to the **Watchtower**. Then speak to Mint near the entrance. Answer with the first choice to help her out, examine all key points inside the watchtower, they are all marked with a **red exclamation mark (There should be an object on every floor)**, when you examined every point, head to the rooftop for an event. After this, Mint will join Courageous.

blocks.heading: Story Quest: Find Our First Years
blocks.name: Story Quest: Find Our First Years
blocks.content: To finish this quest, you need to find the following students from Thors and convince them to join Courageous.

If you have been following this guide, Mint should be the last student for you to recruit. When you have recruited everyone, head back to Courageous, and examine the computer terminal at the Bridge area (5F) and select the second option to finish the quest
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

Speak to Towa and set your destination to Lake Lacrima. Go to the General Store and purchase a copy of **Gambler Jack Reprint #7**. Then speak to **Sheeda**, she will teach you the [Hearty Milk Hotpot](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Hearty_Milk_Hotpot "walkthrough/Recipe List") recipe.

blocks.heading: Story Quest: Monster Madness
blocks.name: Story Quest: Monster Madness
blocks.content: Head to the Cabin at Lake Lacrima and speak to Elder Ivan or Gwen. Then head to Nord Highlands - North, you will find the quest monster near the fishing spot by the northeast area of the map.
Watch the event scene and the quest will end.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

Afterwards, go to the Ancient Quarry, the fastest way to go there is by going to Nord Highlands - North and use the Quick Navigation to get there instantly. Head north, you will find an **EP Charge II** at the center of the entrance, then speak to **Clara** and pick the first choice and then explore the Ancient Quarry.
**Ancient Quarry**

[![Trails of Cold Steel 2 AC Revise.png](./images/43514220-Trails_of_Cold_Steel_2_AC_Revise.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_Cold_Steel_2_AC_Revise.png)

Go straight until the path split into north and south. Here at the center, you will find a **Trial Chest for Emma, Fie, Gaius and Jusis**. Defeat the Trial Chest Boss to unlock the Overdrive function for them.

blocks.name: Alpha Diglem x2

stats.Item Drop: La Forte R, Voice Breaker II

blocks.strategy: Then go all the way to the south end, it will take you outside, you will find a **Volcanic Rain** Quartz in a treasure chest, and then return to the previous area. Go to the north path, you will find a [Pandora](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Pandora "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") **Master Quartz** in a monster chest. Then to the east, you will find some **U-Materials** in a treasure chest. Then heal yourself with the Orbment station, and go to the north end of the map to fight the boss.

blocks.content: Afterwards,Clara will join Courageous. Return to Courageous, and visits Clara at the Hangar (1F), she will let you know about he EX-Orb function, which allows you to equip special types of Quartz for Valimar. The game will also unlock the **Awakener's Call** ability, which allows Rean to summon Valimar in battle for a few turns.
**If this is your second playthrough or higher, return to the same spot where the Giant Spider Boss (Ginosha-Zanak) is, you will find a copy of Black Records #1.**

[![Trails of cold steel ii ancient quarry black records 1.jpg](./images/f0da0b50-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ancient_quarry_black_records_1.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ancient_quarry_black_records_1.jpg)

Report your status using the Computer Terminal at the bridge area. When you finished everything you need to do for today, speak to Towa and select the second option "**Commence Operation**" to advance the story.

rows: If you got Sharon's Black Virtue at the beginning of the Act, make it a permanent fixture on Rean. This accessory, coupled with Impede 1-2 will make Rean's Arc Slash incredibly effective.

blocks.heading: December 17
blocks.content: Select your party members, **Eliot and Sara will be mandatory members**. Once you set your party members, there is no turning back. Watch the event scene, you will face a mech battle.
**Twin Dragons Bridge**
Watch the event scene, then head upstairs to Twin Dragons Bridge 2F.

[![Trails of cold steel ii twin dragons bridge 2f 3f.png](./images/e9eac30f-450px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_twin_dragons_bridge_2f_3f.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_twin_dragons_bridge_2f_3f.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii twin dragons bridge last.png](./images/5f0bf28b-150px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_twin_dragons_bridge_last.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_twin_dragons_bridge_last.png)

Follow the northwest path, eventually, you will see two rooms, go to the room to the right to find an **EP Charge III**. Then go south the center of the map, go to the west and examine the duct, go all the way to end to find the **Flood** quartz in a monster chest. Return to the center area, and follow the east path, and go all the way to the southwest corner, examine the duct, go to the west end to find a **Curia Balm** in a treasure chest. Return to the duct and go to the east end, you will a pair of Ebony Boots in a treasure chest. Then examine the switch by the door to unlock it. Then go all the way to the southeast corner to go upstairs.

Go straight and examine the duct to go the west side. Continue forward and go to the second room to find a **Tearal Balm** in a treasure chest. Then continue on the southwest path until the path split. Head down to the southeast corner, break the boxes to find a **Yggdrasil** quartz in a treasure chest. Then go north to the center area. Pick up the **Ebony Vest** in the treasure on your left. Then examine the duct on the right, it will take you downstairs. Then examine the duct on the east to back up to the 3rd floor. Then take stairs on the north to go the last floor. Go all the way to the north end, you will find some **Sepith** in the north room's treasure. Then return to center, heal up with the Orbment Charging Station and then fight the boss ahead.

blocks.heading: December 18
blocks.content: [![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

blocks.name: Bonding Events
blocks.content: When you can control Rean, head to the Grand Market and speak to **Gibson**. He's the first NPC on the left, he will teach you the **Comforting Cappuccino** recipe. Then shop at Cornette, the shop at the center of the Grand Market, and purchase a copy of **Gambler Jack Reprint #10**. Then go to the west end of the Grand Market, and speak to the NPC, **Marco**. Marco will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 9**. Then head to the house on the west end of town. Speak to **Becky** to recruit her to Courageous. Doing this will add 2 AP, you can do later as well, but recruiting Becky now will give you 2 AP instead of 1. You can also speak to Margot in the Weathercock Inn and Rosine in the Chapel's side room to get some free consumables items. Then attend the Bonding Event of your choice. Doing Elliot, Emma, Jusis, Sara, and Towa will update a page to their character profile. When your done, take the east exit of Celdic to end the day.

rows: Gibson: First shop at the Grand Market.
Marco: Grand Market (Shop at the west end)
Recruit Becky to Courageous. (She's located in the house on the west end of town.)
Becky can be recruited later, but recruiting her now will give you 2 AP instead of 1.
Add Page 2 to Elliot's Character Profile.Link EXP +500
Add Page 2 to Emma's Character Profile.Link EXP +500
Add Page 1 to Jusis' Character Profile.Link EXP +500
Add Page 1 to Sara's Character Profile.Link EXP +500
Add Page 1 to Towa's Character Profile.Link EXP +500

blocks.content: The game will add up all the AP you have earned in this Act. If you acquired a total of **36 AP**, you will get a **S Rank**.

blocks.heading: December 19
blocks.content: Read the quest list on the computer terminal. Afterwards, select your party members, Millium will be a mandatory member of this Act. If you have recruited Becky from earlier, she lets you exchange items, this is similar to the pawnshop feature from the previous Cold Steel. At the start of the Act, it is advisable to sacrifice one Attack 2 and one Action 2 quartz together with 20 U-Materials to get the corresponding Ex-Orb for Valimar. This Act has 2 rather tough Mech battles and this way you can benefit from Stacking Ex Spheres with Valimar

rows: Note: Tri-colored Onigiri trick is no longer useful as it won't yield enough profit to fund your party on a consistent basis.From now on spend mira and sepith to deck only those characters you intend to bring with you to the Act boss. Do so only for a party of 4 (i.e. don't bother with the supports unless you plan to use them) and switch only the supports around so they get Exp too. This way you'll minimize mira and sepith usage and still manage to update your equipment/quartz. Whenever the story forces you to use specific characters, simply swap armor/boots/quartz around. Try to save as much mira and sepith as possible until further notice.

blocks.content: Head to the **Front Deck** (3F), speak to **Celine**, this will update her profile and talk to Alfin, she should give you a **Medal of Charity**. Then play some Blade with your friends to raise your Link EXP. You can also speak to Millium and Jusis on the 3rd Floor for a short event. Then speak to Towa, you will notice the Celdic region will be added to Courageous Destinations. There are some new [Cryptids](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses "walkthrough/Optional Bosses") added for this act. There is one located in Lunaria Nature Park and one in Nord Highlands - South (Near the stone monument). Defeat them now or later, then visit Ymir.
**Ymir**
[![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

rows: Purchase the Cheese Fondue Recipe Book from the General Store.

blocks.content: Head to the general store, and purchase the **Cheese Fondue** Recipe Book. There is also a new obstacle added to the Snow Board mini game. Then go to **The Phoenix Wings**, and speak to the receptionist, **Baggins** to start a side quest.

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Creeping for Creeps
blocks.name: Side Quest: Creeping for Creeps
blocks.content: Speak to Baggins at The Phoenix Wings and accept his request. Afterwards, you will end up in the snowboard mini game chasing after the two snow sheep. Catch them both to get **2 bonus AP**. If you fail to do so, you can retry until you catch the two sheep. Just don't give up. After this, a mini boss will pop in.

blocks.name: The Boss
blocks.reward: Reward and AP, Sepith Mass x500, 3500 Mira, 3(+2) AP

blocks.content: [![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

blocks.heading: December 20
blocks.content: [![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

rows: Colonel Gaul: Twin Dragons Bridge - Office
Examine the bookshelf on Twin Dragons Bridge - Office
Added the function to use Horses on field map.
Replaced one of the Navigation pilot.
Unlocked the Sword Training Facility (4F) for you to use
Speak to Dorothee after Angelica's event.
Completed "I'll Make a Mech Out of You" Quest
Speak to Beryl on Legram. (This is the same page from Nord Highlands)

blocks.content: Go back to Courageous and speak to **Towa**, select **Proving Ground** as your destination.

When you're in the training camp, go and speak to **Munk** at the eating table (Southeast). Select the first choice to help him find his sticker. Before coming into the battles, equip Valimar at the Courageous with Attack 1-2 and Action 1 Ex-Orb. Then go to speak to **Towa** (Courageous) and select the **Twin Dragons Bridge** as your destination.

Go across the bridge to the Central Area then enter the Command Room via the north door, the same area where you fight the end boss of Chapter 2 - Act 1. Speak to **General Craig**, and he will give you Munk's Sticker. Then speak to **Captain Gaul** (Man on the left), he will teach you the **Seafood Salad** recipe. You can also speak to Fiona for a short scene. **Examine the bookshelf** in the same room, you will get the **Hot Colour** for your Orbal Bike. Head back down, save your game then speak to Major Neithardt on the southwest side by the Panzer Soldat. Accept his offer to start one of the story quests.

blocks.heading: Story Quest: I'll Make a Mech Out of You
blocks.name: Story Quest: I'll Make a Mech Out of You
blocks.content: Once you've accepted Major Neithardt's offer, you will face him in a mech duel. If you manage to beat him, you will **2 extra AP**. If not, then reload the save file from earlier and try again.

blocks.name: Spiegel - Sword
blocks.reward: Reward and AP, Skill Handbook, Add Page 1 to Major Neithardt's Character Profile, 3500 Mira, 3(+2) AP

blocks.content: [![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

[![Trails of cold steel ii twin dragon bridge.png](./images/d66d3a9d-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_twin_dragon_bridge.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_twin_dragon_bridge.png)

Return to where Major Neithardt was, and go through the south gate. Head up the stairs,over the bridge then go back down the stairs on the left where the chest containing **Flare Bomb** Quartz is. Afterwards, go back then head east and exit to the **Twin Dragons Bridge - Garrelia Side** and pick up the **Yellow Pendulum** and the **Sepith Mass** from the treasure chests in the area. Also there is a new monster in this area called Metal Beetle and it became available after December 18. It is logged in the battle notebook under Garrelia Byroad but you can find it here. Then go near the entrance to Garrelia Byroad 1, just under the bridge, there is a **trial chest**. Clear it to unlock the Overdrive function for **Laura**, **Machias**, **Gaius**, and **Sara**.
Go to **Garrelia Byroad 1**, and travel southeast to **Garrelia Byroad 2**, and go to the southwest corner where the treasure chest is. You will find the story quest monster.

blocks.heading: Story Quest: Just Getting Wormed Up
blocks.name: Story Quest: Just Getting Wormed Up
blocks.content: Defeat the monster located at the southwest corner of Garrelia Byroad 2.

blocks.name: Abyss Worm x6
blocks.reward: Reward and AP, Poison 2, 2500 Mira, 4 AP

blocks.content: [![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

After this, return to Courageous, watch the event scene and set your destination to Proving Ground. Speak to Munk by the southeast area, to return his sticker. **Munk** will join Courageous. Speaking to Munk will let you participate in the **Radio Sweepstakes**, where you wager some money and after you have participated in 5 random battles, Munk will hand out some prizes.

Return to Courageous, set your destination to **Celdic**. Head to **East Celdic Highway**, and go to the farm (Northeast of the map). You will find **Paula**, speak to her and offer her help. Now go back to Celdic and go to **West Celdic Highway**, and head north near the entrance of **West Celdic Highway 2**, there is an event scene to find the **black horse**. (You will need **Jusis** in your party for the horse to appear) The horse will run away, you will find it at the entrance of **Lunaria Nature Park**. Afterwards, go to **Lunaria Nature Park**, and on **Lunaria Nature Park 2**, you will find the horse by the northwest corner. You will automatically return to Paula's location. After this event, she will join the Courageous. Recruiting Paula lets you ride your horse on the field map.

Now return to Celdic and take go to the west exit to **West Celdic Highway**. Take the west exit again to go to **East Trista Highway**. You will find **Alan** and **Loggins** right at the southeast corner of the map. Accept their request, and go to the three points marked with a **green exclamation mark** on the map. After you have scouted the three areas, Alan and Loggins will join the Courageous. Alan and Loggins will open the **Sword Training Facility** in Courageous.
Return to Celdic and go to **East Celdic Highway**. Then take the east exit to **East Celdic Highway 2**. From here take the south exit to **North Kreuzen Highway 3**.

[![Trails of cold steel ii north kreuzen highway 3.png](./images/acee8ab1-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_north_kreuzen_highway_3.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_north_kreuzen_highway_3.png)

Go to the Northeast corner of the map. You will find **Fidelio**, speak to him and accept his request. Then open the treasure chest behind him to find a **Judgement Bolt**. Then go to the west end of the map to find an **EP Charge III** in a chest. Afterwards, go to the southwest area of the map, you will find a **Trial Chest** for Jusis and Millium.

blocks.name: Godlinoceros
blocks.strategy: After defeating the Trial Chest boss, leave this area heading north then go to **East Celdic Highway 3**. Go to the Northeast area of the map where you will find **Dorothee** (Make sure **Emma** is in your party, or else Dorothee won't be there.). Defeat the black sheep to finish Fidelio's request.

blocks.content: Return to Courageous. Then go to the second floor and speak to **Dorothee** at the book room. This will update her character profile. Then go to the bridge area and examine the computer terminal and report your status.

rows: Checklist before going to Roer.Attack 1-2 and Action 2 Ex Spheres on Valimar.Impede 1-2 for Rean if planning on using him for delaying from now on.Only 2 Trial Chests can be opened during this visit. Those recommended are the one at Spina Byroad (Alisa & Emma) and Sachsen Mountain Path (Eliot & Gaius).

blocks.content: After that, speak to Towa, and select the option highlighted in red to advance the story, this will end the day.

blocks.heading: December 21
blocks.content: Select your party members, Alisa and Rean will be mandatory members. You won't able to switch your team once the decision is set. There is three trial chest in the upcoming part of the game, and you can only access two at most with the right party setup.
**The Trial Chests:**

[![Trails of cold steel ii spina byroad.png](./images/4e7c985f-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_spina_byroad.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_spina_byroad.png)
Check the fishing spot near the boat. Afterwards, follow the linear path you will see a trial chest. You need Alisa and Emma in your party to access the trial chest.

blocks.name: Ghost Tomartian
blocks.strategy: Defeat the trial chest boss, and explore the west end of Spina Byroad, you will two treasure chest over there. After that, head for the east exit to Roer.

blocks.content: **Roer**
[![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)
Visit the key event locations, they are marked with a **red exclamation mark** on the map.

items.label: **Airship**
items.detail: Roer's Airport (The NPC, Anton can also be found on this location)

blocks.content: After you have examined the locations listed above, return to Roer for an event. Then head to **Dvance's Diner** (Located in the west end of town). Then visit the general store and purchase **Gambler Jack Reprint #11-12**. Then take the south exit to **Nortia Highway**.

[![Trails of cold steel ii nortia highway.png](./images/13d2164d-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_nortia_highway.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_nortia_highway.png)

Travel to the west area of Nortia Highway 1, you will find three treasure chest in this area, a **Tearal Balm**, **Athelas** Quartz, and some **Sepith**. Afterwards, take the south exit to Nortia Highway 2. Continue south, and when the path splits, go to the southeast path, you will find the Aries master quartz in a monster chest. Then return to the previous path and go to the west area to find a **Nightmare** quartz on the north, and some **U-Materials** on the south end. Then return to the center path, continue forward until, when the path splits again, you will find a **trial chest**. You will need **Eliot**, **Emma**, **Millium**, and **Sara** to do the Trial Chest. Then take the south exit to **Nortia Highway 3**.

blocks.name: Pudgy Penguin x2
blocks.strategy: Go straight, and you will eventually find an EP Charge III right on the center. Afterwards, go to the southwest exit of the map, you will end up in **Schwarz Drache Barrier**. Doing this will reward your party with **2 extra AP**. Then head inside the Rest Area, and speak to **Margarita** sitting on the table. Afterwards, return to **Nortia Highway 3** and explore the north area. At the very northwest corner, you will find an **EP Cut 2** quartz and a **fishing spot**. Then go to the very north end of the map, you will find a **Phantom Phobia** quartz near Ignis Shrine. The game won't let you access Ignis Cave at the moment. Return to Roer. Now take the northeast exit to **Sachsen Mountain Path**.

blocks.content: [![Trails of cold steel ii sachsen mountain path.png](./images/96ef3251-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_sachsen_mountain_path.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_sachsen_mountain_path.png)

Travel north and when the path splits, follow the northeast path, you will end up finding a Monster Chest at the end. Clear the Monster Chest to get the **Suzaku** Quartz. Return to the original path, and continue west, you will find a **Celestial Balm**. Then go south, and on the southeast corner, there is a **Red Pendulum** in a treasure chest. Now head to northwest exit to Sachsen Mountain Path 2. Go to the west end of the map, you will find a pair **Dragon Skin Boots**. Return to the starting area, and follow the east path. When the path splits, go to the southwest corner to find the **Cross Crusade** quartz. Then head to the northeast corner of the map for a **Tearal Balm**. You can also examine the waterfall near you, it contains a fishing spot. Then go to the west end of the map, you will find some **U-Material**. and a **Trial Chest** on the northwest corner of the map. Clear the Trial Chest to unlock the Overdrive function for Eliot and Gaius.

blocks.name: Master Cyron
blocks.strategy: Then take the north exit to the Iron Mines. Fight the group of Jaegers. After you have defeated them, take the west exit, you will be fighting another wave of Jaegers. After this fight, you will end up on the train, each room will contain a wave of Jaegers to fight. Once you reach to the **#2 car**, you will get surrounded by an enemy pincer attack. Use your S-Craft if you need to. Afterwards, heal up at the orbment station and leave the train. Watch the event scene, in the end, you will fight a group of machines. Defeat them, then head upstairs to the northwest exit to get to the **RF Building**.

blocks.content: **RF Building**

[![Trails of cold steel ii rf building 5f 12f.png](./images/33ce188d-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_rf_building_5f_12f.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_rf_building_5f_12f.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii rf building 20f.png](./images/22371f88-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_rf_building_20f.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_rf_building_20f.png)

Go to the southeast room, you will find a **Celestial Balm** in the treasure chest. exit out and continue west, eventually you will end up on the west end of the map, go to the room on the east, you will find some **Sepith Mass**. Exit out of the room, and head to the southeast corner to find a **Dragon Skin Jumpsuit**. Then take the elector on the west end to get to the **12F**.

Head to the north room, you will find a **Grim Butterfly** quartz. Leave the room, and follow the east path, and enter through the bottom center area. Go north and enter the first room to your left, you will find an **EP Charge III**. Then go follow the center path to go southeast. Then enter the first room on your right, a **Curia Balm** can be found here. Exit out, and go to the room located southeast. You will find a **Dark Pendulum** in a treasure chest. Then go take the elevator on the east end to reach the **20F**.

Travel to the north room, you will find some **Sepith** in a treasure chest. Then exit out and go to the southwest path, keep moving until you see a door to your left. Go inside you will find a **Tearal Balm**. Then return to the original path, and when you get the path splits, go all the way south, and enter the room in the southeast area. You will find the **Black Bell** quartz. After that go all the way to the northwest corner of the map, and continue south all the way to the room on the southwest area. In here **examine the computer**, this will unlock the room on the northwest of the map. Go there to find a [Katze](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Katze "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") **Master Quartz**. Then head to the west end of the map and take the elevator to get to 23F. Heal through the Orbment Station and save your game, then confront the boss.

blocks.name: Regenenkopf Type-0
blocks.strategy: After you have defeated the boss, the game will give you the option to save and also allow you to change your Ex-Orb. Equip only **Attack 1-2** and **Action 1** Ex-Orbs. **THIS IS VERY IMPORTANT for N3 Run**.

blocks.heading: December 22
blocks.content: [![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

blocks.name: Bonding Events
blocks.content: You are given 5 bonding points for today. Attend **Alisa**, **Alfin** (don't forget to pick up **Dark Colour** in the shelf near her), **Laura**, or **Millium** to update their profiles. Then head to Roer Residence #1 (2F southeast) and speak to **Instructor Mary**, this will add a page to her profile. Afterwards, head to Dining Bar (F) and speak to **Grand** (man with orange hair), he will teach you the **Sweet Blue** recipe. Then go to the general store and purchase the latest issue of **Imperial Chronicles**. Then speak to **Linde** or **Vivi** in the same room. After that, go to **Dvance Diner**, and speak to **Logg**, who is behind the counter. Logg will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 10**.

rows: Factory Worker Logg: he is running the counter at Dvance Diner.
Examine the shelf near Alfin at RF Building 24F.
Speak to Instructor Mary in Roer Residence #1.
Add Page 1 to Alisa's Character Profile.Link EXP +500
Add Page 2 to Aflin's Character Profile.Link EXP +500
Add Page 2 to Laura's Character Profile.Link EXP +500
Add Page 2 to Millium's Character Profile.Link EXP +500

blocks.content: When you have finished all side activities, go to the Roer Airport, and go inside the Courageous on the northeast corner to end the day. The game will accumulate all the AP you have earned through the chapter.

rows: Quest: I'll Make a Mech Out of You

blocks.heading: December 23
blocks.content: [![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

rows: Purchase the Pasta Recipe Book from the General Store (Ymir) or from Dorothee.
Norton: Roer Airport, after clearing "Gone Air" quest. (Second Playthrough only)
Speak to Angelica at Courageous 1F - Workshop.
Speak to Alan at Courageous 4F - Sword Training Facility.
Speak to Beryl near Terra Shrine (Garrelia Byroad)
Speak to Emily at Courageous 4F - S. Range Training Facility.
Speak to Nicholas after you have recruited Margarita.
Speak to Klein at Courageous 5F - Bridge after the "Gone Air" quest.
Speak to Rex at Schwarz Drache Barrier.
Unlocked the Arts Training Facility (4F) for you to use.
Opens a premium store for Courageous.
Giving Margarita a Peculiar Dish, she will reward you with items.Give every Peculiar Dish, and Margarita will reward you with a rare quartz.
Gives you a reward based on the amount of data collected on your battle notes

blocks.content: When you regain control, Speak to **Towa** twice on the Bridge. A list of new locations will be added, such as **Eisengard Range,** and **Roer Region**. After that go to 4th floor, and speak to **Emily** and **Alan** at the training facility, this will update their character profiles. You can also speak to Alfin for a short event. After that, head to the second floor and speak to **Dorothee** and purchase the "**Pasta**" recipe from her. Also play some **Blade** with your friends to build your Link EXP between them. Then head to the first floor and speak to **Angelica**, this will update her profile.

The final two [Cryptid](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses "walkthrough/Optional Bosses") will also appear, there is one located in Nortia Highway 2 and Eisengard Mountain 2.
Head to the second floor to the **Infirmary**, examine the card on the desk to start one of the side quests.

blocks.heading: Side Quest: The Sweetest of Challenges
blocks.name: Side Quest: The Sweetest of Challenges
blocks.content: When the quest starts, Class VII will gather at the meeting room. Listen to everyone's opinion and then repeat it again. After that, you will need to select the Culprit. Pick the 2nd choice, Machias it will give you 2 extra AP.
Picking Emma will give you just 1 AP on the latest Japanese patch.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)
Afterwards, you should focus on recruiting the remaining students of Thors. Go to the **Roer** first.
Obtain any of the trial chest you were missing from the previous act.
**Trial Chest Locations**

Afterwards, go to the **RF Store** and speak to **Hugo**. Accept his request and then leave Roer. Go to **Legram** and speak to **Watteau's Store** and talk to **Watteau**. Then go to **Ymir's General Store** and speak to **Lio**. You should also visit the snowboard area, a new course has been added. Return back to Roer and speak to **Hugo**. Hugo will join Courageous and will open up the premium store allowing you to buy some of the best accessories of the game at a hefty price.

Go to the **Roer Institute of Technology** (Northwest Building 2F). Speak to **Ratto** on the top corner. Accept his request, leave town by going to **Nortia Highway 2**. Head to the southwest corner of the map to find **Stefan**. **Bring Machias in your party** to trigger an event battle. Afterwards, Stefan will join Courageous. You could also fight the Cryptid, [Agnagarn](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses#Agnagarn "walkthrough/Optional Bosses") on the southeast end of Nortia Highway 2 if you think you can beat it.

Then go to **Nortia Highway 3**, and on the fishing spot location (Northwest of the map), you will find **Kenneth**. Speak to him and accept his request, then use the fishing spot that is right beside you and **catch a Glutinous Bass**. When you successfully catch one, speak to Kenneth and he will join Courageous.

Travel to **Schwarz Drache Barrier** (Southwest exit of Nortia Highway 3). Speak to **Rex** near the gate entrance, it will update his character bio and he will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 11**. Then go inside the resting area, speak to **Margarita** with **Millium** in your party. Margarita will join Courageous. Giving Margarita a Peculiar Dish will reward you with items and a rare quartz if you manage to give her every single Peculiar Dish. Then speak to the lady by the counter, she will teach you the "[Tomato Stew](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Tomato_Stew "walkthrough/Recipe List")" recipe. Return to Courageous on the cafeteria section, speak to **Nicholas** to update his character profile. Return to the bridge and speak to Towa. Set your destination to **Eisengard Range** to start one of the side quest.

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Gone Air
blocks.name: Side Quest: Gone Air
blocks.content: Watch the event scene, you automatically fight two Jaegers to start. After that, you will end up in the same airship from the end of Chapter 1. Pick up the Freeze Quartz from the treasure chest in the Northwest corner, if you forgot it from the previous chapter. Take the southwest entrance to enter the lobby room. You will fight another group of Jaegers. Defeat them and visit the room located northwest. Defeat the single Jaeger to get a Card Key 1 from him. Examine the Bridge door to the north then visit the 3rd floor by taking the southeast entrance. You will fight four more Jaegers. Defeat them to get Card Key 2. Go to the south end entrance to the 4th floor. Defeat the five Jaegers to finish the quest. Klein and Hibelle will also join Courageous.
If this is your **second playthrough or higher**, speak to **Norton** at **Roer's Airport** to receive a copy of **Black Records #4**.

[![Trails of cold steel ii black records 4.jpg](./images/e9b940fc-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_black_records_4.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_black_records_4.jpg)
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)
When you return to the **Courageous**, speak to **Klein** at the bridge to update his profile.
Then revisit Eisengard Mountains, on the landing spot, there is a **Trial Chest** for Fie and Laura. Clear it to unlock the Overdrive Function for them.

blocks.name: Encounter
blocks.strategy: This boss has very high physical defense. It is best to have Fie using arts since you don't have many defensive options with this team. The boss is also very vulnerable to attacks that cause faint, take advantage of Fie's Scud Wing or Laura's Brilliant Spin to take an extra turn. Make sure you have someone equipped with Tearal to heal yourself, the boss can hit pretty hard. When you reduce the Boss's HP below 50%, use your S-Craft to finish it off.

blocks.content: When you cleared the Trial Chest, you can also find three new enemies in Eisengard Range. The Shadow Dancer, Venom Demon, and Steel Golem. You can also fight the final Cryptid, [Lindbaum](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses#Lindbaum "walkthrough/Optional Bosses") in the same area where you start a new game. If you manage to kill all five [Cryptids](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses "walkthrough/Optional Bosses"), speak to **Alfin** to get the **Medal of Strength** from her. Return to Courageous. Speak to Towa and set your destination to **Celdic**. Go to East Celdic Highway 2, to get to **North Kreuzen Highway 3** to finish one of the side quest.

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Kreuzen for a Bruisin'
blocks.name: Side Quest: Kreuzen for a Bruisin'
blocks.content: You will find the quest monster located at the southwest end of North Kreuzen Highway.
When you defeat the boss, you will receive an **Intimidation** quartz.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

blocks.heading: Shrine Trials Part A
blocks.content: For the main story, you will need to revisit all the Shrines again. There will be a new Trial area that you can access. You will need to bring **Emma** to your party to access these new areas. All the Shrines are highlighted with a red exclamation mark on the world map. Select one of the four Shrines, once you clear one of the four there will be a story event that interrupts you. You will eventually finish the remaining three shrines later.
**Terra Shrine - Trial**

At the entrance to the Terra Shrine, you will find **Beryl**, speak to her to update her character profile page 1. Then go inside the Shrine. Use the warp device to get to the trial area. You will need Emma in your party to trigger the event scene to unlock the gate.

[![Trails of cold steel ii terra shrine trail 01.png](./images/faced069-190px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_01.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_01.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii terra shrine trail 02.png](./images/c2fe865e-260px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_02.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_02.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii terra shrine trail 03.png](./images/51bc5a30-180px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_03.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_03.png)

Follow the straight path all the way to the end, you will find some **Earth Sepith** in a treasure chest. Then run back to the center, you will notice a giant wall, you will need to bring someone with a strike proficiency of **B** or higher (**Laura**, **Millium**, or **Machias**). Hit that wall, it will make it drop, creating a bridge for you. Continue the linear path all the way to very top, you will find an **Ancient Glyph** in a treasure chest. Go downstairs, and move to the east path, and you will find another wall near an enemy. Smack the wall to make a bridge. Then go to the northwest corner to find a **Tear All Balm** in a treasure chest. Then follow the east path, and around near the bottom east corner, you can find a ladder, go down from there and on the end of the path you will find three treasure chest. A **Genbu** Quartz in the monster chest and **two Trial Chests**, one each for Alisa/Fie and Machias/Millium.

blocks.name: TC Boss (Alisa/Fie)
blocks.strategy: Then go upstairs all the way to the end. You will find an **Earth Bell** Quartz on the a treasure chest. Go back upstairs, you will see another wall for you to hit. Hit the wall to create a bridge. Cross over to find an **Orbment Station** and a **Warp Point**. Enter the gate to fight a boss. The boss is based on how many Shrines you have cleared. For your first run, read the [End of 1st Shrine](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_3#End_of_1st_Shrine "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 3") section, any further, read [Shrine Trials Part B](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_4#Shrine_Trials_Part_B "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 4").

blocks.content: When you defeated the boss, go to the top and grab the **Zemurian Crystal** to clear Terra Shrine.
**Aria Shrine - Trial**

[![Trails of cold steel ii aria shrine trail.png](./images/c993ffc3-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aria_shrine_trail.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aria_shrine_trail.png)

Go inside Aria Cave, then take the warp to the midpoint. Head to the gate to get to the trial area. Head to the north end, you will find a strange green switch. You will someone with a **B Rank proficiency of Piecing** (Alisa, Fie, Machias, Sara) to activate the switch. Activate the switch to raise the elevator up. Travel to the center area, then take the south path, activate the switch to lower the platform. You will find a **Ragna Vortex** quartz in a treasure chest. Return to the previous area and take the northeast path. Activate the switch to go up. Go to the south end to find a treasure that contains a **Wind Bell**. Travel to the northeast area, you will find a **Celestial Balm EX**, from here go west, you will find a switch, activate to create a piece of the bridge of the center. Then take the southwest path, activate the switch to lower the platform. Go to the west area, activate the switch to get up. From here, go to the southwest end, activate the switch to get down. You will find a **Zeus Gem** inside a Monster Chest.

rows: DO NOT LEAVE ARIA Shrine - TRIAL GROUNDS WITHOUT THE ZEUS GEM. This quartz is essential if you want the Cancelling strategy to work on the Final Dungeon bosses, especially McBurn.

blocks.content: There is two Trial Chest in the same spot, one is for **Fie/Millium** and the other for **Jusis/Sara**.

blocks.name: TC Boss (Fie/Millium)
blocks.strategy: Then go to the north area to find some Wind Sepith in a treasure chest. Then to the east side there is another switch. Activate the switch to complete the bridge in the center. Take the center exit to get to the boss room. If this is your first Spirit Shrine Trial, then read the [End of 1st Shrine](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_3#End_of_1st_Shrine "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 3") section, if not then read the [Shrine Trials Part B](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_4#Shrine_Trials_Part_B "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 4") section. When the boss is defeated, head upstairs and grab the Zemurian Crystal to clear Aria Shrine.

blocks.content: **Aqua Shrine - Trial**

[![Trails of cold steel ii aqua shrine trial.png](./images/366b66e7-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aqua_shrine_trial.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aqua_shrine_trial.png)

Go inside Aqua Shrine, take the warp portal to the mid point. Approach the gate for an event scene. Enter to get to the Trial Area. Follow the path to the end, you will find a switch. The switch requires someone with a **B rank proficiency in Thrust** (Fie, Gaius, Jusis, Sara) to activate. When the switch is activated, the water will drain, climb down the ladder. Head to the southeast end of the map, you will find a switch, activate it to drain the water below. Then climb up ladder nearby, you will find a **Maelstrom** quartz in a treasure chest. Then take the ladder on the center, climb down, and take ladder on the northwest corner, climb up to find a monster chest with a Yaksha quartz. There is two Trial Chest here as well, one of them requires **Alisa/Machias** and the other is **Laura/Millium**.

blocks.name: TC Boss (Laura/Millium)
blocks.strategy: Then go back down, and go to the south end of the map, to find a **Curia Balm**. Afterwards, head to the north end of the map, you will see another switch, activate it to drain the water. Take the ladder at the southeast corner of the map, you will find a **Water Bell** quartz in a chest. Climb back up and on the very southeast end of the map there is an **EP Charge IV** in a treasure chest. From here go to the northwest end of the map, there is a ladder here, go down and head to the northeast end for another switch. Activate it to drain the water. Then go back down, and take the ladder nearby, you will find a lot of **water sepith** in a treasure chest. Climb back up, then go to the northeast end of the map to get to the boss room. If this is your first Spirit Shrine Trial, then read the [End of 1st Shrine](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_3#End_of_1st_Shrine "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 3") section, if not then read the [Shrine Trials Part B](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_4#Shrine_Trials_Part_B "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 4") section. When the boss is defeated, head upstairs and grab the Zemurian Crystal to clear Aqua Shrine.

blocks.content: **Ignis Shrine - Trial**

[![Trails of cold steel ii ignis shrine trial.png](./images/41b9d67e-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ignis_shrine_trial.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ignis_shrine_trial.png)

Head inside the Ignis Shrine and go downstairs to enter the Trial area. Go to the northwest corner, and examine the lamp. Put the flame out with Rean's field attack, this will create a bridge to the east. Cross through and head to the southeast corner to find some **Fire Sepith** in a treasure chest. Then find fire switch at the northeast corner. Put out the flame to activate the north bridge. Go there, to find another switch, activate it to create the other half of the bridge. Behind the switch, climb the ladder round the corner, you will a **Purgatorial Flame** quartz in a treasure chest. Then go to the west side of the map, on the southwest corner, you will find a **Fire Bell** in a treasure chest. Then go to the very northwest corner of the map, you will find a **Carnage** quartz in a monster chest. There is also **two Trial Chests** here, one is for **Alisa/Sara** and the other for **Machias/Emma**.

blocks.name: TC Boss (Alisa/Sara)
blocks.strategy: After you have clear the two Trial Chest, go southeast from here to find another fire switch. Put out the flame to create a bridge to the northeast area. Going to there will lead you to the boss room. If this is your first Spirit Shrine Trial, then read the [End of 1st Shrine](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_3#End_of_1st_Shrine "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 3") section, if not then read the [Shrine Trials Part B](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_4#Shrine_Trials_Part_B "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 4") section. When the boss is defeated, head upstairs and grab the Zemurian Crystal to clear Ignis Shrine.

blocks.heading: End of 1st Shrine
blocks.content: At the end of the first Shrine, you will end up fighting Magic Knight Dire Wolf.

blocks.name: Encounter
blocks.strategy: Dire Wolf is similar to Ortheim, as it possesses an area attack capable of dealing approximately 6000 damage in a straight line. When you've depleted 25% of the boss's HP, it will activate its Boost Up skill, enhancing its strength, defense, speed, and healing itself. Prolonging the battle can be hazardous due to these buffs. As the boss is highly immune to status effects, it's advisable to concentrate on self-buffing for maximum damage output or cast arts against it.

blocks.content: Leave The Shrine for an event, then speak to George in Courageous 1F. Select the option highlighted in red to advance the main story.

blocks.heading: December 24 & 25
blocks.content: [![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

rows: Speak to Linde at Courageous 5F - Bridge.
Speak to Loggins at Courageous 4F - Sword Training Facility.
Speak to Fiedelio at Courageous 2F - Computer Room.

blocks.content: Jusis and Sara will be fixed party members for the next story segment. Survey all the key events in Celdic. The key event locations are, **Chapel south room**, **Otto** (Manager House 2F), and **Claire** (Army Guardhouse entrance). When you see all three key events, head to the east exit of Celdic to see another event scene then you will be returned to the Courageous. When you regain control, assign your party members, and equip Valimar with the best Ex-Orbs you have for the upcoming battle. Then go and speak to **Fidelio** in the Computer Room (2F), **Loggins** in the Sword Training Facility (4F), and **Linde** on the Bridge (5F). Doing this will update their character profiles.
When your ready, speak to Towa to start the operation.

blocks.name: Kestrel
blocks.strategy: After this, you will be fighting a group of Jaegers with just instructor Sara. Sara will also unlock her final S-Craft ability, use it against the group of Jaegers, when your CP is fully recharged use it again. After that, you will end up in Auroch Fort without instructor Sara.

blocks.content: **Aurochs Fort**

[![Trails of cold steel ii aurochs fort 01.png](./images/7513d794-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aurochs_fort_01.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aurochs_fort_01.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii aurochs fort 02.png](./images/50ac0577-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aurochs_fort_02.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aurochs_fort_02.png)

Go to the north path, go all the way to the far east and enter the room directly south. Examine the switch to unlock the gate on the center. Go there, the path will split into three, follow the west path, enter the first room as you go south. You will find a **Curia Balm** inside a treasure chest. Exit out of the room, go all the way to the southwest end to find a **Cast 2** in a chest. Then go back north, and on the center, there will another gate blocking the way, from here go to the northeast path, enter the first room you see, there is a **Celestial Balm EX** in a treasure chest. Exit out of the room and follow the northeast path all the way to the bottom. You will find an air duct, go through the air duct to get to the southeast area. Examine the switch on the left, it will unlock the gate to the center. Go to the center to find the **Hellfire** quartz in a monster chest. Then go to the room located southwest, inside there you can find some **Sepith**. Then take the southeast entrance to get to the 2nd floor.

Follow the north path until you reach to the center. You will notice a gate blocking the center, head to the left side of that gate, you will find an air duct, enter it and you will find a **Chrono Burst** Quartz in a treasure chest. Unlock the gate by pressing the switch beside the treasure. Then travel all the way to the southwest corner, there is another air duct, enter and you will find yourself at the southeast corner of the map. Grab the **Tearal** Quartz in a treasure chest, then press the switch to unlock the gate. Now go all the way to the northwest corner of the map. Then examine the air duct, you will end up and north section. Run to the southeast corner, press the switch nearby to unlock the gate below you. Go past the gate to find a **HP 2** Quartz. From here, travel all the way to the north end. There is another duct, go through the duct, and then go to the room on the west, you will find an **EP Charge IV** in a chest. Then follow the north path, and there is a room on the northeast end. There is some **U-Materials** in the treasure chest of that room. Leave the room then take the northeast exit to get to the 3rd floor.
Examine the Orbment Station and heal yourself, then fight the boss through the door.

blocks.name: Duvalie
blocks.strategy: Use your S-Craft to eliminate the Sleipnir as soon as possible. Duvalie has a considerable amount of HP, so it won't be a quick takedown. Her attacks can inflict confusion or freeze on your characters. It's a good idea to position your tank or main attacker at the front to draw her attention and prevent her from hitting your entire party with her area-of-effect attacks. When Duvalie's HP falls below 60%, she may unleash her S-Craft, Prism Calibur, which can deal 10,000 to 13,000 damage, resulting in an instant knockout. During this phase, consider having Jusis cast Platinum Shield as a precaution. Another possibility is to use Adamantine Shield.

blocks.heading: December 26
blocks.content: [![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

blocks.name: Bonding Events
blocks.content: When you regain control, go to Alouette Inn in Artisan Street. Speak to **Giolamo** by the counter, he will teach you the **Fruit Parfait** recipe. Then talk to **Maicel** by the table, he will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 12**. Then go to the Duke's Mansion, for an event scene. Then go to the room in the west for another event, don't forget to pick up **Windy Colour** from drawer in Jusis' room. Attend the **bonding events**. One of the conditions to trigger the bonding trophy for this game is to attend the bonding event of this date. Keep a backup save file for this point of the game for this reason. Attending **Fie**, **Gaius**, **Machias** and **Towa'**s bonding event will add a page to their profiles. Attending **Alfin'**s bonding event, will also unlock her [final partner event](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_4#Chosen_Partner_Event "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 4") on December 30th. When you're done all your side activities go to Bareahard Airport and enter Courageous to end the day.

rows: Link EXP +800, Required for the final partner event.
Add Page 2 to Fie's Character Profile.Link EXP +800
Add Page 2 to Gaius' Character Profile.Link EXP +800
Add Page 2 to Machias' Character Profile.Link EXP +800
Add Page 2 to Towa's Character Profile.Link EXP +800

blocks.content: The game will accumulate all the AP you have earn throughout this act. If you acquired a total of **38 AP**, you should get a **S Rank**.

blocks.heading: December 27
blocks.content: [![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

rows: Purchase the Curry Recipe Book from the General Store.
Lohengrin Castle, SW corner. (Second Playthrough only)
Speak to Jackass at Jackass' Repair Shop (Roer) *Alisa must be in party.
Speak to Paula at Courageous 1F - Hangar.
Speak to Dorothee at the Courageous 2F- Book Room.
Speak to Kenneth at Courageous 2F - Cafeteria
Speak to Klein at Courageous 3F - Weapon Shop.
Speak to Munk at Courageous 3F - Resting Area
Part of the "Hearts in Harmony" Quest line.

blocks.content: When you regain control, explore the ship, go and speak to **Munk** and **Klein** at the third floor. This will update their character profiles. You can speak to Jusis on the same floor for a short event. Then go to the second floor and speak to **Dorothee**, this will update her profile. Then purchase the **Curry** recipe from her. Then speak to **Kenneth** in the cafeteria and talk to Emma or Celine for a short event. Then head to the first floor and speak to **Paula**. Play the Blade mini game to raise the Link EXP between your classmates. When your done, speak to Towa at the bridge area and set your destination to **Ymir**.

blocks.name: Event
blocks.content: A new course is added to the Snowboarding mini game. Finish that course to get a **Passionate Rouge** accessory. Then go to Ymir Valley for an event. (**Note:** Quick Travel will not trigger the event. You need to manually enter Ymir Valley) Then head to the very end of the Valley, you will find Beryl, speak to her and she will join Courageous. Return to Courageous. You can speak to Beryl in the **Fortune Room, 2F**(southeast room). Beryl will act as a fortune teller, asking her will let you know your relationship status of your friends and **who is qualified for the final bonding event scene** for the **bonding trophy**.

rows: A: 1st Two-Team Battle: At the end of this Act, you'll be forced to fight 2 consecutive battles, each with a different team. You get 2 guest characters to help you for story purposes (one per battle) to assist the Class VII members minus Sara. This translates into the need to bring a well-leveled, well-equipped party to each battle. However, in keeping with the economics, and bearing in mind that Def is not that relevant in Nightmare, there are only a few things you need to consider buying/making:10 weapons for the whole Class VII. SARA WILL NOT PARTICIPATE IN THESE BATTLES, so you don't need to count her in if you don't want to.Enough Attack Stacks (i.e. only the 3 Attack quartz) for those members with naturally high STR. Even if you don't intend to use them, now is a good time to assemble these quartz. (Members would be Rean, Laura, Gaius and Millium).Str and Spd Task Equipment. If you have the Fishing Points, get at least 4 Warrior or Gladiator Badge accessories from Kenneth in the Courageous or Annabel at Ymir's pub.A Canceler Set and a Dodge Set if you have not build them before. Canceler is for Rean, Dodge is for Fie.Make sure Rean, Laura, Fie and Emma have 2 slots in their ARCUS that are upgraded to Level 2 (one element-oriented, one non-elemental).B: Sepith gathering/Level Building: In order to fund the above requirements, you'll need 90 000+ mira and good amount of sepith, in particular Fire and Time. Time will be the hardest to come by, so spend it wisely. Spend some Water and Earth sepiths (in batches of 1000) if you need to reach certain amounts of mira, since they are the most common and are easily replenished.Where to get the sepith/levels? For story purposes, you'll be required to tackle the 3 remaining Shrines, use these chances to fight every possible enemy in the dungeons. You'll need to swap character to complete the Trial Chests inside (2 per Cave for a total of 6) so take those chances to do a little grinding.Ideally, you'll be aiming to have as many Fighter/Tanks and any other Class VII member on between Lv 107 and 109. That, plus Stacking will guarantee you'll rip apart the Chapter boss teams. With Impunity. On this Act, you have access now to the Four Tools. See the Advanced Strategies section for more detail.C: Rather you use Four Tools or not, Alisa will get the True Gladiator Belt as a permanent fixture on her EVERY TIME SHE IS AN ACTIVE MEMBER ON BOSS FIGHTS. Also, she will be permanently linked to Rean, switching only to Fie if you plan on using her.

blocks.content: **Legram**

Then speak to Towa and set your destination to **Legram**. Then go to the Arseid Mansion at northwest end of the map. Speak to Josef, the chef that is speaking to the maid, Josef will teach you the **Mixed Grill** recipe. Then go to the **Bracer Guild** and speak to **Klaus** or **Miles** to start one of the side quests.

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Mist Opportunity
blocks.name: Side Quest: Mist Opportunity
blocks.content: Accept the request, and then go to the port area and speak to Klaus. You will need Emma in your party or else Klaus won't let you go to Lohengrin Castle. Go to the top of the hill to enter Lohengrin Castle.

[![Trails of cold steel ii lohengrin castle.png](./images/57b29f79-320px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_lohengrin_castle.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_lohengrin_castle.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii black records 5.jpg](./images/0a313079-310px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_black_records_5.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_black_records_5.jpg)
**Note:** If this is your second playthrough or higher, you can find the last book of Black Records on the bottom left corner.

Head upstairs, and go to the east side, you will find the **Chakravarti Gem** in a monster chest. Then go to the opposite side and pick up the **EP Charge IV** in the treasure, then enter the door nearby to the Left Wing. Pick up the chest on your way down, you will get a **Dark Emblem**. When you reach the end, you will find an orbment station, heal up and then fight the boss at the bottom center.

blocks.name: Lucifuge
blocks.strategy: In this battle, the boss will consistently summon Shadow Spirits to assist them. If you manage to defeat all of the spirits, the boss will focus on summoning more spirits rather than directly attacking you. These spirits tend to use arts, especially if you can't eliminate them quickly. In such cases, using your S-Craft can help you get rid of them instantly.One particularly troublesome aspect of this fight is the boss's "Soul Pinon" skill, which incapacitates one of your party members and slowly drains their health. Using an S-Craft to deal enough damage can force the boss to release your ally instantly.

blocks.content: [![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)
**Bareahard Section**

Afterwards, go to Bareahard. Then go to Fortnum Books at Christie's Galleria 2F and purchase the **Gambler Jack Reprints**. Then head to the Noble District, and go inside house #2, speak to **Bridget**, and call out **Alan** for Bridget to Join Courageous. Then go to the Central Plaza and enter Sorciere Restaurant. Go upstairs and speak to **Caroline**. Accept the request, then bring **Alisa** to your party. Travel to Station Street and go to the entrance of **Underground Waterway**, you will find **Theresia**. Speak to her and bring **Emily** to recruit her to Courageous. Theresia will let you access Level 4-5 for the Shooting Range facility, clearing all 5 levels will give you the [Cypher](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Cypher "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") Master Quartz. Now go to Artisans' Street and enter **Turner's Jewelers** and speak to **Colette**. Select the first choice to help her. Then go to **South Kreuzen Highway** and find four pieces of Dryad's Tear (it's marked with a **green exclamation mark** on the mini map). Once you have collected all the Dryad's Tear, report to Colette, and she will join Courageous. Head back to Bareahard, you can finally access **North Kreuzen Highway 2**, in there you will find a **new fishing spot** and a **Trial Chest** for **Alisa/Elliot/Laura/Jusis**.

[![Trails of cold steel ii north kreuzen highway 2.png](./images/8506fc71-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_north_kreuzen_highway_2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_north_kreuzen_highway_2.png)
When your done the activities listed above. You should travel to Aurochs Fort by going through the Aurochs Canyon path.

[![Trails of cold steel ii aurochs canyon.png](./images/485827b4-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aurochs_canyon.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aurochs_canyon.png)

There will be a fishing spot right near the entrance. You can also find some good treasures along the way. A **Trial Chest** for **Machias/Jusis** on **Auroch Canyon 2**. Then the side quest monster on Aurochs Canyon 3.

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Canyon, or CAN'Tyon?
blocks.name: Side Quest: Canyon, or CAN'Tyon?
blocks.content: You can find the quest monster at the **southeast corner of Aurochs Canyon 3.**
Defeat the boss monster and you will be rewarded with the **Rakshasha** quartz.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

Then when you reach to Aurochs Fort, speak to **Rex**, bring **Fidelio** to recruit him to Courageous. Then head into the **Rest Area - Crescent Moon**, and speak to **Spare** behind the counter, he will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II Chapter 13**.
**Celdic & Roer**
After this, head to Celdic. Bring Elliot to your party and speak to Rosine at the Chapel to start one of the side quest.

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Hearts in Harmony
blocks.name: Side Quest: Hearts in Harmony
blocks.content: Speak to Rosine with Elliot in your party. If you do not have Elliot, Rosine won't talk you. Accept her request. You will need to find people that are proficient with music for her. The people are:

items.label: Instructor Mary
items.detail: Roer House #1 (2F Southeast) (This will also update her character profile)

items.label: Andre
items.detail: Street Musician on Bareahard Central Plaza

items.label: Hibelle and Bridget (You don't need to talk to them, but they must be recruited in order for you get the bonus 2 AP)

blocks.content: Once you have gather everyone, go to the Celdic Chapel, and speak to Rosine at the center, select the first choice when your ready. If you found every member, you get an extra 2 AP, if not then you get 1.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)
Then set your destination to **Roer**. **Have Alisa in your party** and go to **Jackass' Repair Shop**, and speak to **Jackass**, accept the request to start a hidden quest.

blocks.heading: Hidden Quest: Fathers Pocket Watch
blocks.name: Hidden Quest: Fathers Pocket Watch
blocks.content: Take Alisa to your party and accept the request from Jackass. To complete this quest, you'll need to talk to four sets of NPCs.

items.label: Harves and Gregor
items.detail: Entrance of Roer Institute of Technology (Roer 2F NW).

items.label: Miner Aman
items.detail: Inside Sachsen Iron Mines — Freight Station Area.

blocks.content: Once you've spoken to these four NPC groups, report back to Jackass to complete the quest.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)
Afterwards, return to Courageous and report the quest you have finished to the computer terminal. Then work on the main story by finishing the remaining **Shrines**.

blocks.heading: Shrine Trials Part B
blocks.content: You will need to clear the other three Shrines. Read the [Shrine Trials Part A](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_3#Shrine_Trials_Part_A "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 3") for navigating through the Shrines. When you reach to the end of the second Shrine Trial, you will fight **Magic Knight Heavy Ruby**.
Then when you reach the end of the third Shrine Trial, you will be fighting Isla-Zeriel.
At the end of the final Shrine Trial, you will be fighting Grianos-Aura.

blocks.name: Grianos-Aura
blocks.strategy: When you have collected all four Zemurian Crystals, return to Courageous. Before, you do the next story objective, create the whole set of **Attack Ex-Orbs** and equip them on Valimar. Then create a backup save file at this point. You can speak to Emma or Celine at the Cafeteria for a short event. Then revisit any of Shrines if you miss a Trial Chest. This is also a great time for you to defeat the all [Cryptids](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses "walkthrough/Optional Bosses") if you haven't done that yet. When you're ready, speak to **George** at the Courageous Hangar and select the choice in red to move the main story.

blocks.content: **Note:** All of your party members are automatically boosted to level 108 (Sara will be at 111) at this point if you haven't level them.

blocks.heading: December 30
blocks.content: [![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](./images/decd49d2-ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

blocks.name: Event
blocks.content: Attend the bonding event of your choice by playing a game of Blade with them at the leisure room. Read the description above for more information. Then head to the 4th floor and **speak to Monica twice**, this will update her profile and she will also give you a **Kaiser Burger**. If you have acquired every profiles listed so far, speak to **Alfin** at the 4th floor to receive the Phoenix Medal of Love. If you have acquired all three Phoenix Medals, Alfin will also give you the [Vermillion](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Vermillion "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") Master Quartz. If this is your **second playthrough and has already acquired the Vermillion Master Quartz, you will receive a Deus Gem**. You can also speak to Professor Schmitt at the Hangar for a brief scene. When you are all ready, go speak to Towa at the bridge and start the operation.

rows: If you are planning on getting the Bonding trophies for multiple characters, you have two chances now to set them. You'll be given the chance to play one match of Blade with a Class VII member (plus Sara) and to choose a support for the next Mech Battle. Both events are worth 800 Link Exp and they both make your choice partners available for 'Chosen Partner Event' at the beginning of the Finale if said characters also have Link Lv 6 (6000 EXP or higher) with Rean.

blocks.content: Assigned your party members, you will be split into two teams. Towa is a mandatory member for **Team A**, and Angelica for **Team B**. Any members that are not selected will be put into Team B. Make sure both teams are fairly balanced or else you might struggle in the upcoming boss battle.

If you did not meet the required Level nor have the best weapons for all of Class VII, your best bet is to put Laura and Fie on Team B with Machias, while Team A gets Alisa and Jusis (or Emma if you want to use arts) since their fight can be harder. If however, you have the best possible weapons, and your characters are Lv 107-109, all you need are 2 S-Crafts (not even buffed) per fight to wrap things up if you give all fighters the [Warrior Set](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Advance_Strategy_-_Stacking_\(In-Depth\)#Warrior "walkthrough/Advance Strategy - Stacking (In-Depth)") (minus Rean).

blocks.name: Event
blocks.content: Then select your link partner for the Divine Knight Battle, **whoever you selected here is also one of the possible conditions for triggering the final bonding event for the bonding trophy**.
After this, make all the preparation you need in Trista. You can only adjust Team A. Then you ready, head to Thors academy and you will start Team B's battle first and then Team A after.
Afterwards, the game will accumulate all the AP you have earned through this chapter. If you acquire a total of **67 AP**, you will get a **S Rank**.

blocks.content: [![Trails of cold steel ii academy.jpg](./images/7a4451b9-320px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_academy.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_academy.jpg) [![Trails of cold steel ii trista.jpg](./images/b49aaadd-320px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_trista.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_trista.jpg)

Once you have regained control, there be a ton of side activities you need to do first. Go to Trista, near the **entrance of the Upper Class Dorm**, speak to **Lotte** and she will teach you the **Tomato Pot** recipe. Then go back to Thors and enter the **school library**. Speak to the Librarian **Karol**, she will give you the Finale of Gambler Jack II. If you have collected all chapters of Gambler Jack II, head to **Kirsche's Cafe & Inn** and speak to **Vice Principal Heinrich**, he will give you a **Zemurian Ore**. This will allow you to forge the strongest weapon in the game. Then speak to him again to update his profile. There are also **two fishing spots in Trista**, one is the **pond at the north end** of the school, the other is the river at the northeast of town. Then head to the **house located northeast of Trista** and examine the bookshelf. You can collect the **Fiery Colour** for your bike, it is to the right of the staircase on the bottom floor. Speak to all the **NPCs** listed below to update their character profiles (There is a lot!) After you have spoken to all of them, you should speak to Alfin at the principal office to get the **Medal of Love** if you haven't received it yet. Afterwards, take the **west exit of Trista** to see an event. Then speak to **Towa at the school rooftop**. Then read the [Chosen Partner Event](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Finale#Chosen_Partner_Event "walkthrough/Finale") section just below this guide.

blocks.name: Rean will learn his final S-Craft
blocks.content: Rean will learn his final S-Craft. Then read all the side quests from the computer terminal. Then head to the 1st floor and speak to George, you can use that Zemurian Ore to craft the strongest weapon in the game.

rows: Give the Zemurian Ore weapons to Rean and Laura. These two are crucial for the Cancelling strategy to go faster (especially Laura's).

blocks.content: Now there will be a ton of side activities you need to do before you start the main story. Update everyone's character profile listed below.

At this point of the game, you should have collected all the recipes. Try to cook every type of superb, unique and peculiar dishes. Then **give all superb dishes to Monica** at the 2nd floor Cafeteria. When you give her all 22 superb dishes, she will give you the **Impenetrable Shield** quartz. Then speak **Margarita** at the northern end of the corridor and **give her all peculiar dishes**, she will give you the **Chaos** quartz. If you have discovered all 22 recipes, speak to **Ferris** in the Game Room, she will give you the [Genesis](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Genesis "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") master quartz. Then go to the 3rd floor and speak to **Bridget** and **give her every type of Unique dishes**, she will give you the **Revolution** quartz.

If this is your **second playthrough** and **have collected all the Black Records books**, speak to **Instructor Thomas** at the Book Room (2F) and give him all the Black Records, you will get a trophy later for this. On the off chance you failed to get one of the Black Records there is a small chance Micht in Trista or Becky on the third floor of the Courageous could have one in the Curios section, leaving Micht's store and entering again refreshes his stock and gives you another chance of the book appearing so keep doing this until it appears. Then head to Ymir and speak to Rean's father at the Baron's Mansion, this will also unlock an optional dungeon called the **Glacia Shrine** located in the very west end of **Ymir Valley 1**. Defeating the [boss](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses#Isra-Zamiel "walkthrough/Optional Bosses") in this optional dungeon will give you the **Ice Crown** accessory that gives a permanent 10 CP Regeneration per turn and a +50% Critical Up status effect and also **The Frost Hunter** trophy.
After this, the first thing you need to do is finish all the training module inside Courageous. Clearing all 5 stages of each training module will give you a master quartz.
