blocks.content: Speak to Towa, she should give you the [Emblem](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Emblem "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") Master Quartz for recruiting all students for Courageous. Then head to **Ymir**, if you have caught 23 different types of fishes, speak to **Annabelle in Ymir Valley** for an event. This will let you catch the last fish, **Arch Tyrant**. Catching the final fish will let you purchase the **Aeolus Gem** from her. There is also a **new course added to the snow boarding mini game**. Clearing it will give you the **Skanda Gem**. Return to Courageous and speak to Kenneth at the Cafeteria, he will give you the [Orochi](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Orochi "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") Master quartz if you caught the Arch Tyrant from earlier. You can also purchase the **Sennin Gem** from him.

blocks.name: After you have finished that, work on the side quests
blocks.content: After you have finished that, work on the side quests. Completing each quest will give you a **Zemurian Ore Shard**, which means you can get another ultimate weapon when finishing all side quests.

blocks.heading: Side Quest: My Jormungand Don't Want None
blocks.name: Side Quest: My Jormungand Don't Want None
blocks.content: Head to the end of East Celdic Highway 3, you will find the quest monster on the northeast end where Point D used to be.
Once you defeated the boss, you will get a Zemurian Ore Shard.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Sachsen Violence
blocks.name: Side Quest: Sachsen Violence
blocks.content: Have Courageous land on Sachsen Iron Mines, then go to Sachsen Mountain Path 2, you will find the quest monster at the northeast area near the fishing spot.
Once you defeated the boss, you will get a Zemurian Ore Shard.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Nord by Nord-east
blocks.name: Side Quest: Nord by Nord-east
blocks.content: Go to Nord Highlands - Northeast, you will find the quest monster at the center area.
Once you defeated the boss, you will get a Zemurian Ore Shard.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

blocks.heading: Side Quest: Ymir, Far, Wherever You Are
blocks.name: Side Quest: Ymir, Far, Wherever You Are
blocks.content: Head to **Ymir Valley - End**, you will find the quest monster on the left side.
Once you defeated the boss, you will get a Zemurian Ore Shard.
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

Return to Courageous and use the Zemurian Ore Shards to create another ultimate weapon. Now go Trista, there will be some side activities you can still do. Speak to **Beatrix** at the Main Building Infirmary, this will update her character profile. Then speak to the head priest at Trista's Chapel. Accept the request to start a hidden quest.

blocks.heading: Hidden Quest: Absentee Father
blocks.name: Hidden Quest: Absentee Father
blocks.content: Accept the request from Father Paulo. Then, speak to the head priest in each major town or city. If you bring **Sara and Gaius** with you, there will be some slight changes in the final scene. You will need to speak to the priests in this order to complete the quest:
[![MarginCS2Test.png](./images/2cdda5a8-MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)
Once your finished the quest, use the Courageous computer and report your quest. You should get the gold trophy for reaching **315 AP** along with the **Lion Heart** accessory.
You can also explore the other half of East Trista Highway. There will be some new monsters that can be filled in the battle notes, and also some unopened treasure chest.

[![Trails of cold steel ii east trista highway 2.png](./images/85985f58-320px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_trista_highway_2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_trista_highway_2.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii east trista highway 1.png](./images/da856e19-320px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_trista_highway_1.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_trista_highway_1.png)

At this point, you should have collected **284 battle notes**. Go and speak to Stefan in the computer room (2F). He will give you the [Calamity](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Calamity "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") master quartz. If you fought all the monsters until now and you have 283 battle notes then most probably you are missing Metal Beetle which is available after December 18 in Twin Dragon Bridge - Garrelia Side.

There are also some optional story scenes that you can see, such as visiting **Scarlet**, Duke Albarea in the Albarea Mansion (Bareahard) with Jusis, the resting area in Proving Ground, and speaking to **Professor Schmitt** in Kirsche (Trista). Because this will be the final time you will be able to use the Courageous, make sure you have finished everything you need to do before starting the operation with Towa.

rows: Cook 15 (or more) Tomato Hotpot with Alisa to get "Seasonal Hotpot", the Unique Dish, as well as any Food that gives the best possible Spd boost, 30 should do if you have the ingredients for it, if not 20.

blocks.content: Commence the operation when your all ready to go. The game will also add up all the AP you earned.

rows: Quest: My Jormungand Don't Want None
Quest: Ymir, Far, Wherever You Are

blocks.heading: Final Mission
blocks.content: Select your party members, Machias will be mandatory for this part.

**Karel Imperial Villa** Run up the hill, you will immediately fight some Alliance Forces soldiers. Defeat them. then when you reach the entrance of the villa, you will fight another group. Then go inside the villa, defeat the soldiers.

[![Trails of cold steel ii karel imperial villa 1.png](./images/89315eda-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_karel_imperial_villa_1.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_karel_imperial_villa_1.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii karel imperial villa 2.png](./images/c48dc9d4-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_karel_imperial_villa_2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_karel_imperial_villa_2.png)

Heal up using the Orbment Station in front of you. Then go upstairs and pick up the two treasure chests. The one on the north contains **Claiomh Solarion** and the one on the south is a **Seraphic Ring**. Go back downstairs, and take the north exit to outside. You will find three treasures, some **U-Materials**, **Tear All Balm**, and a **Goldia Key** in a monster chest. Exit out of this area, and then take the south entrance to Villa 3, you will fight another group of soldiers. Use the Golden Key to unlock the door, travel to the north end, you will fight a large group of soldiers. The Tough Enemies in here (the Sleipnirs) and the boss have high Def and HP, but neither uses arts so you might want to use Emma or Elliot with the Aries Master Quartz and Shadow Blade (both get the Might Set) since their ADF is not that high. Laura, with [Warrior Set](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Advance_Strategy_-_Stacking_\(In-Depth\)#Warrior "walkthrough/Advance Strategy - Stacking (In-Depth)") and a Zemurian Ore Weapon works wonders on them. When you reach to the exit, defeat the large group of enemies. Then heal up with the orbment station next to the door. Go inside to fight the boss.

After the fight and following cutscene, if you have received all the Medals from Princess Alfin, the Emperor will award you with the **Grand Cordon** accessory. This powerful accessory gives +100 STR/DEF/ATS/ADF and +10% Critical Up.

blocks.heading: Infernal Castle
rows: From this point onward the Damage Dealer you choose for the Layer Bosses should be equipped with the Lion Heart Accessory, which grants +100 to Str/Def/Ats/Adf and makes the wearer immune to all Debuffs except Death.This is not as hard in practice, since each Sector that comprises this place has lots of tough enemies that will allow you to close gaps. However, for the sake of being capable of using the Cancelling strategy against each of the Sector Bosses, and even if you don't intend to it is advisable that Laura and Emma are kept in the active party throughout the whole dungeon since they are your best damage dealers. Having the Bravery, Angel and Mirage Master Quartz on Lv 5 will make your life easier. If you haven't leveled Mirage to Lv 5, Aries on Lv 4 + a Shadow Blade and Time Bell will make do.As for regular quartz, it is advisable that you use all U-Materials you get to Customize R (attack arts) and II (Breaker and Status) versions of your quartz. Doing so will help increase you parameter a bit more when Stacking.Consider the possibility of including Lost Arts on someone other than your appointed Mage. Preferably on someone who is going to be using mostly crafts in battle since regardless of the damage or effects, all Lost Arts will use the full amount of EP the character has. Also, don't worry about the damage done (if using Lost Oblivion or Sol Eruption) since what you want are the status effects. Crafts that will become lifesavers in these battles are Heavenly Gift, Holy Song, Burst Drive, Concealing Wind and Spirit Unification.

blocks.content: **Layer 1**

Watch the event scene, when you regain control, assigned your party. It is recommended you bring Laura to your party, she gets her character profile updated when encountering the first boss of the Demon Castle. Run up the long set of stairs, then take the exit. It will bring you to the first layer of the Demon Castle. Defeat the set of monsters.

[![Trails of cold steel ii infernal castle 1 1.png](./images/9128b477-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_1_1.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_1_1.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii infernal castle 1 2.png](./images/a84647f5-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_1_2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_1_2.png)

Follow the path on the west. Keep following it, when you reach to the north east corner, you will find a **Tear All Balm** inside a treasure chest. From here, continue south all the way to the south end, climb up the ladder, you will find a switch. Activate it, to unlock the gate right in front of you. Go through that gate, and continue all the way to the southeast area of the map. There is a little narrow hallway on the southeast side, go there to find a **Virgo Boots** in a treasure chest. Then climb on up the ladder on the very south end of the map. You will find a switch right behind an enemy. Activate the switch to create a bridge in the center area. Go there, and on the west end will lead to the entrance to section 2.

Run up the stairs in front of you and open the gate. Travel southeast, and when the path splits, there will be a treasure with a lot of **Sepith** on the north. Then follow the path on the southeast area, when it reaches to the northeast area, there is a little path right at the northeast corner, that will let you find the **Alfried Armor**, which is the best armor for men. Then open the gate on the west, you you will a switch in this area. Activate it to create a bridge directly south. Head all the way south, on the when you reach the very south end, there will be a switch. Activate it,will let you go to the southeast area which contains a monster chest. Clear it to receive a **Deus Gem**. Then move to the southwest end to the exit of layer 1.

Use the Orbment station in front of you. You can use this station to purchase the second strongest weapon of the game. If you need to switch party members, use the warp point to go back to the beginning. When your ready, go inside the gate to fight the boss. If you bring **Laura** to your party, she gets her profile note updated.
**Layer 2**

[![Trails of cold steel ii infernal castle 2 1.png](./images/f56490e3-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_2_1.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_2_1.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii infernal castle 2 2.png](./images/61cd1a77-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_2_2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_2_2.png)

Head all the way to the west end. You will find a warp point, orbment station and an eye type switch hanging on a pillar. Use the warp and **head back to the location of the previous boss**, you will find a **Zemurian Ore Shard**, finding four of these will let you make another ultimate weapon. There should be one ore per stratum. You should save your ultimate weapon for the Damage Dealer you intend to use for one. Good options are Elliot, Emma (if you go for Arts), Sara, Millium or Gaius. Now return to the previous area (Layer 2), and Attack the eye switch with your field action, this will removed the vines in front of you. Travel all the way to the north end. You will find an eye switch on the northwest corner. Hit the switch to remove the vine on the east. Go all the way to the east end of the map, climb the ladder near you, you will find the **Sirius Boots** inside a treasure chest. Climb back down, then take the path south around the center of the map. Go all the way to the south end, you will find a tonne of **Sepith Mass** on the southwest corner. Then take the southeast path, when the path splits, you can find a **Celestial Balm Ex** on the southwest end of the map. Then travel to the north, when the path splits into two, take the west path. Go to the end, you will find two switches. one of them unlocks the gate in front of you, and the other will remove the vine at the very west end of the map. Go to the west end to find a **Brahma Gem** inside a monster chest. Return to the previous area and take the northeast path all the way to the end. You will find a switch near the snake type monster. Activate the switch to remove the vines in front of you, then go to the top to section 2.

Section 2 is very short, just keep running to the top, and just right pass the gate, there is a switch, you will need to hit it with someone that has a **B rank Thrust proficiency**. Doing this will removed the vines in front you, head all the way down, you will find the Riva Garm enemy and a **Zeram Powder** in a treasure chest. Then head back and enter the gate. Use the orbment station to heal up, and if you need to switch party members, use the Warp point and teleport to the beginning. When your ready, enter the gate to fight the boss. You will need Fie in your party, or else the game won't let you pass. There are some slight changes if you bring Alisa and Millium as well.
**Layer 3**

[![Trails of cold steel ii infernal castle 3 1a.png](./images/cae564e0-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_3_1a.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_3_1a.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii infernal castle 3 1b.png](./images/d147540b-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_3_1b.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_3_1b.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii infernal castle 3 2.png](./images/9194fb5b-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_3_2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_3_2.png)

Head to the northeast path to find a warp point. Teleport back to the same area where you fought the previous boss at layer 2. You will find another **Zemurian Ore Shard**. Then return to the previous location. Then head upstairs and go to the very northwest corner of the map, you will find a switch. Activate it to unlock the gate in the northwest area. Go there and **defeat the Nosferatu** mini boss, it will create a connecting bridge for you to cross later. Then travel to the southwest area, hit the switch to connect the roads on the east. Here you will find each passage is shrouded in a red mist, crossing the wrong passage will lead to an enemy encounter. The correct path on the first passage is the one on the left. After you cross through, check on the right side to find an **EP Charge IV** in a treasure chest. The correct passage on the second gate is the one on the right. Then the next one is on the middle. Then check on the very left side You will find some **U-Materials** in a treasure chest. Then take the middle passage. Then activate the switch near the right side. This will unlock the gate to your left. Go there and head down through the ladder in front of you, then go to the southeast end of the map, you will find the **Celestial Armor** in a treasure chest. Then go to the opposite end, you will find a switch, activate it to unlock the gate near you. Go there to find another Nosferatu mini boss, defeat it to complete the bridge on the center. Go to the center of the map and follow the path to the end to reach section 2.

Follow the path counterclockwise to the end, it will lead you to the outside corridor. Then do the same again, follow the path to the very end, you will find a monster chest that contains a **Mars Gem**, this monster chest also contains a monster known as the Greater Demon, make sure you scan it if you want to finish the monster trophy. Then take the east exit to go the east side of section 2. Head to the very north end of the map, you will find **a switch that requires a B Rank in strike proficiency** to break. Break the switch to reveal a hidden path, climb up the ladder to find a **Diabolos Gem** inside a monster chest. Go back down and head to the west side of the map, you will find a switch, hit it then go to the center of the map to see another switch. This switch requires someone with a **B Rank proficiency in piercing** to break. This will let you access the northwest end of the map which contains "**Loa Boots**". Then return to the previous area with the switches, and take the north exit to reach the end of Layer 3. Use the orbment station to heal up, and if you need to switch party members, use the Warp point and teleport to the beginning. When your ready, enter the gate to fight the boss.

rows: Before this fight, cook 15 Seasonal Hotpot and 20-25 Food Items that grant Str/Def/Spd bonus. Rean and Laura must be Level 125 for their combined S-Crafts to kill the boss when it reaches the HP Mark.

blocks.content: **Layer 4**

[![Trails of cold steel ii infernal castle pinnacle.png](./images/4079628c-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_pinnacle.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_pinnacle.png)

The last layer of the Demon Castle is a linear one. Up ahead use the warp to return back to the last area where u fought the previous boss to collect another **Zemurian Ore Shard** then go back to the telport and return to the **Highest Stratum - Start**. Just keep running the spiral set of stairs, when you encounter the first large enemy, you can find the **Chaos Armor** behind it. Once you reach a dead end, you will find a switch, hit it to create a bridge. As soon as you cross over, you should find a **Zemurian Ore Shard**.

[![Trails of cold steel ii infernal castle pinnacle zemurian ore shard.jpg](./images/9272116e-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_pinnacle_zemurian_ore_shard.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_infernal_castle_pinnacle_zemurian_ore_shard.jpg)

This is should appear on a ring/donut shape at the map near the pillar. Keep running to the top, eventually, you will find another treasure chest, opening this will give you the **Zeram Capsule** and it's also the final treasure for the Treasure Hunter trophy. At the top, there is an orbment station and a warp point. If you have collected all 4 shards you will be able to make another **Zemurian Ore Weapon**. Prepare your party, check gear and orbments, set Ex Orbs then rest with the orbment station. When you're ready, take the elevator for the final battle.

rows: Preparing for the Final boss, which in reality is composed of 5 consecutive fights, two of them are Mech Battles, you need to reach at least Lv 125 with all party members that you intend to use since two of the fights will be done with different teams. The order is very simple:Round 1 - Your regular Team.Round 2 - 1st Mech Battle.Round 3 - Reserve Team.Round 4 - Main Team.Round 5 - Final Mech Battle.

blocks.name: Crow
blocks.strategy: Watch the event scene, afterwards the game will give you the option to save for the final boss. Assign your party members, there is several phase to the final boss fight, whoever you did not pick with start on the first round of the fight and whoever you assigned for your party will come at the second phase. Both phase are difficult boss fights, the first phase is overall harder, while the second phase hits harder but is also easier to deal with.

blocks.content: Watch the ending credits and save your game.

For this chapter you won't be using Rean and company. You get to play as the characters from Trails from Zero/to Azure (Lloyd is the protagonist of Crossbell Trails games, and Rixia is the girl that Vice Principal Heinrich has an obsession with).

Because you only have two party members for this entire chapter, with no shops and the bosses are rather hard. It is **crucial** for you to level up your party and gather as much sepith and quartz as you can. Getting good quartz for this part is extremely crucial. Gathering all this quartz is going to be your major issue here. **Defense 3**, **Hit 2**, and the **Water quartz** are the easiest to farm and by the end you'll probably have a lot of Defense 3. For this part you should exploit Lloyd's S-Craft, Raging Sun, and **DO NOT SKIP THE ANIMATION**, during Sepith-Up turns to farm sepith faster. Don't worry about CP since our good Investigator has both Lv 5 Force MQ and a True Gladiator Belt equipped. The quartz you need will be farm will be **Impede 1-2**, **Action 3**, **Hit 2**, **HP 2**, and **Attack 3**
**Geofront E**

[![Trails of cold steel ii geofront e section 1 a.png](./images/e806ff64-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_1_a.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_1_a.png)

[![Trails of cold steel ii geofront e section 1 b.png](./images/97837ee2-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_1_b.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_1_b.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii geofront e section 1 c.png](./images/4ccd4ebf-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_1_c.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_1_c.png)

Go to the room on the north, examine the computer terminal to receive the **Crossbell Times**. Then start heading the west hallway. As soon as you reach the door, you will encounter a mini-boss of slimes. Defeating the boss slime has a small chance of dropping quartz you might need. Run to the middle, then go all the way to the south end, and on the southwest corner of the map, there is a **Celestial Balm EX** inside a chest.

Then go back up and take the east path, at the end of the path, you will find an air duct, go inside. The chest in front of you contains an **EP Charge IV**. Then downstairs, there will be two switches, one on the south end and the north end. Climb down on the ladder to the left of the north switch. You will find a monster chest, clearing will give you the **Grail Locket**. Return back upstairs, and flip the north switch, it will move the position of the ladder to the top. Then press the switch on the south end to lower the bridge on the south end of the map. Return upstairs by taking the ladder on the northwest side, then go all the way south, you will end up on the southeast side of the map. Climb down the ladder, then take the air duct on the west. You will find the **Seven Dragon Armor** inside a chest. Return to the previous area, then take the air ducts on the north. Once your out of the duct, on the northwest corner, is a chest that contains the **"Bakuya"** sword for Rixia. Go to the middle, you will find another air duct, go through there to find a switch. Press to create a bridge in front of you. Then take the west exit to go to Section 2.

[![Trails of cold steel ii geofront e section 2 a.png](./images/ad4574c1-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_2_a.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_2_a.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii geofront e section 2 b.png](./images/a2047ace-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_2_b.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_2_b.png)

If you need to heal up, use the orbment station on the west end of the map. Head to the south area, in the southeast corner, you will find an **EP Charge IV** in a treasure chest. Go back up north, and go west on the top of the air ducts. When you're on the other side, go take the southeast path to find a **Strega S** in a treasure chest, then go back to the southwest end and flip the switch, this will lower the bridge on the center south end.

Then go downstairs by heading north, then walk over the air duct on the east, you will find the **Emergency Muppet** within a treasure chest. Then follow the northwest path to downstairs, keep going straight until you reach the room on the southeast end. You will end up fighting some mosquito mini-boss. Defeat the mini-boss and then flip the switch near you. This will shift the platform allowing you to go north.

Then grab the **Celestial Balm EX** in the treasure to the northwest. Then climb up the ladder on the south. Go past the bridge and cross through the air duct on the southeast, head upstairs and flip the switch on the south end. This will lower the bridge, in the previous area, go there to find a **Zeus Gem** in a monster chest. Return back to the previous area and flip the same switch. Then go upstairs and on the southeast end of the map, flip the switch. This should access the west end of the map. As soon as you go there, you will fight a jellyfish mini-boss. Defeat the mini-boss, then head downstairs, on the center go all the way down to find a switch, flip it and this will let you go to the west end to section 3.

[![Trails of cold steel ii geofront e section 3 a.png](./images/3388b47e-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_3_a.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_3_a.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii geofront e section 3 b.png](./images/d942f53a-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_3_b.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_3_b.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii geofront e section 3 c.png](./images/e2479ffe-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_3_c.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_geofront_e_section_3_c.png)

For the third section, you will need to activate the elevator in the starting area by pressing the switches located at the north and south end of the map. This guide will start with the south section first. The south section goes all the way to the southeast corner, climb up the ladder. Then travel to the north end over the air ducts, you will find the**Pentagon** weapon for Lloyd. Return to the previous area, then go west and flip the switch, this will shift the platforms. Now go to the southeast through the air ducts. Go to the west side of the map and climb up the ladder, then cross through the air ducts to find a monster chest. Clear the chest to get a **Zeram Capsule**.

Then go back down, and go to the east end and flip the switch to shift the platforms. Then on the south end of the map, you will find a **Seishin Robe** and a **Tear All Balm** in a treasure chest. Then activate the switch on the bottom, this will release one of the locks to the elevator. Then use the switch on the east end to shift the platforms again, then return to the starting area and explore the north section.

Head downstairs and go to the northwest path, you will find a **Celestial Balm EX** in a chest. Then go inside the air ducts near you. This will lead you to the upper area. Then go following the path south all the way to the southeast end of the map. You will find a Strega P in a treasure chest. Then go north to find an air duct, it will lead you to the northeast area. You will find two switches, activate the one on the right to release the last lock of the elevator. Then press the switch on the north to get down to the first floor. Return to the starting area and ride the elevator down, heal up with the orbment station and take the east exit to the boss room.

blocks.name: Story Quest: The Race to End All Races
blocks.content: Head to the Engineering building and speak with either Angelica or George to begin the quest. You'll be challenged to a race against Angelica, and if you manage to defeat her, you'll earn a **bonus of 1 AP**. If you lose, don't worry – you can initiate a rematch for the AP bonus. Just keep trying, and that extra AP will be yours.
Winning the race is fairly straightforward; as soon as the race begins, hold down the accelerate button, get ahead of Angelica, and block Angelica. Maintain the lead and you should be able to win.

rows: Quest: The Race to End All Races

blocks.content: **Reverie Corridor**
The True Final Dungeon is special in many ways for what it can offer, and what it allows you to use.
**List of Features**

1.  ALL playable characters. Eighteen regular party members (Class VII plus Guests) and Five Special characters (see Dungeon Mechanics).
2.  Increased (X3) Link Exp after fights. Not that much, but significant to close the gaps to the next levels.
3.  Regenerating chests (see Dungeon Mechanics).
4.  Valimar is available for all Boss fights.
5.  Four Zemurian Ore Shards from the defeating the Four sector Bosses. Meaning you can create another **Ultimate Weapon**!
**Dungeon Mechanics**

items.label: Dungeon is composed of Four Sectors, each themed to one of the basic elements (Yellow
items.detail: Earth, Red — Fire, Blue — Water, Green — Wind). Enemies thus have **Resistances** and **Weaknesses to the element of the sector**.

items.label: Semi-Random layout. Dungeon Sectors swap order and layout EVERY TIME YOU LEAVE AND RE-ENTER THE OLD SCHOOL HOUSE.
Order-specific enemies. It affects 2 things: A
items.detail: Type and strength of the enemies. Enemies on Sector 1 are small and can be stunned on the field. Enemies on Sector 4 are 90% Tough enemies which you can't stun. Type percentage shifts from small to tough as you progress through the Sectors. B — Enemy availability. Depending on the Sector order some enemies will appear. So, for example, if you get a Fire Sector before an Earth Sector, new enemies will appear.

items.label: Treasure Regeneration and types. **Each chest is regenerated EVERY TIME YOU LEAVE AND RE-ENTER THE OLD SCHOOL HOUSE**. Content depends on the type/color of the chest: Brown
items.detail: Sepith Caches, Monster Ingredient Caches, high level curative items (Zeram Powders/Capsules). Red — Accessories and Lv 3 quartz. Monster — Special quartz. (Dragon Vision, Genbu, Suzaku, 'Gem' and 'Bell' types). Quality of loot follows the same mechanic as enemy strengh. You get better swag on Sectors 3 and 4.

items.label: Phantasmal Mirrors. The five accessories that allow you to use the Special Characters.

blocks.content: **Playable Characters**

Elise, Alfin, Towa, Angelica, Toval, Claire, and Sharon join as regular party members. On a 1st playthrough, Elise and Alfin will be on Lv 115, Toval, Claire and Sharon on Lv 130, and Towa and Angelica on the level they were at the end of Chapter 2 Act 4.
**Phantasmal Mirrors and Special Characters**

The Mirrors are special accessories you can buy on the Orbment Station at the beginning of the dungeon. They cost 200,000 mira **EACH**. When equipped, they will allow you to use a Special Character in battle. There are 2 Male Only Mirrors and 3 Lady Only Mirrors. The available characters are:
**Special Character Mechanics**
These 5 characters have a specific quirks when you equip the Mirrors on those party members that can do so (remember: they are gender-specific).

1.  Special Characters **do NOT** have **STATUS**, **ORBMENT** and **EQUIP SCREENS**. You CANNOT CHANGE THEIR EQUIPMENT/QUARTZ.
2.  Special Characters **ARE ONLY AVAILABLE IN BATTLE**, substituting the character who has the corresponding Mirror equipped.
3.  Special Character **LEVEL IS NOT FIXED**. This means that their level and overall stats **DEPEND on the character equipped with the mirror**. Put simply, the Mirrors enable the use of new stats, character pallet, quartz set and abilities WHICH REPLACE THOSE OF THE MIRROR USER'S.
4.  Because of point 3, **all Exp and Link Exp goes to the character wearing the Mirror**. Special Characters will **NOT INCREASE THEIR LEVEL/STATS**.
5.  Since Special Characters only appear in battle, they bear no relevance whenever you get out of the Old School House.

Aside from their quirks, each Special offers the effects of the Ice Crown accessory (only available to regular party members after defeating the secret boss inside the 2nd Playthrough-specific dungeon: Glacia Shrine), which gives permanent 10 CP Regeneration and Critical Up status, making them extremely powerful. Quartz sets include Lost Arts and Level 5 Master Quartz, so they also benefit from the full roster of abilities.

Since the final dungeon is completely randomized, this guide won't be providing any steps on navigating through the final dungeon. Just remember at the end of every 4th floors you will be fighting a [Cryptid](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses "walkthrough/Optional Bosses"). When you have reached the 17th floor, you will be fighting the true final boss of this game.
**Suggestion:** You should sell all your Sepith and use all your Mira, this way you don't have to waste a point in New Game+ trying to carry your money over.
**Note:** If this is your second playthrough, defeating the final boss with a Phantasmal Mirror character will unlock a bonus scene.

blocks.name: Event
blocks.content: Sit back and watch the ending. Keep your save data in case if you need to transfer your data for Trails of Cold Steel III. After you completed the game, the Memories option will appear on the system menu. This option will let you watch any movie scenes and the final bonding event (If you're on New Game+, watching the Final Bonding event on December 30, and saving an extra file will update the system data to have the event unlocked in Memories.)

blocks.heading: New Game +
blocks.content: Each time you beat the game, you will get **5 NG+ Points** to spend on bonuses for New Game +. In order to purchase everything, you will need a total of 15 points which requires you to beat the game three times. Playing a second playthrough will allow you to collect the Black Records books, there is a trophy related to this item. You can fight a bonus optional super boss at a location called Glacia Shrine.

[![Trails of cold steel ii new game plus.jpg](./images/d06a1ec4-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_new_game_plus.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_new_game_plus.jpg)
